name: Conservative Alerts
subject: Have you seen this?!👉
body:
Here’s what you missed this week
| **Did you miss what was said this week? Here’s the latest:**
---
| | Got turkey? I doubt it. You can thank Joe Biden for all the empty shelves and soaring prices at grocery stores. The broken supply chain and the continued printing of more money is unsustainable. When you show up to Thanksgiving dinner and receive a weird mashup of whatever was left at the grocery store, be sure to thank Uncle Joe!
---
| | | [ ](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdUMFuwyAM_Rp6awWEQHrIYVtX7TJNu-yKCLgNGiERkFbd18-psk2ahCz7Pdv4PddyoUQFG99yyhljXFLKKK92DIw67ZkCqCmoU0cEHczZGFv8GE2AVHZ2HDZ9S5UTDKTsaqEcdMqqisrGyU7SiglGN6HtS5kyqR4IP-IrV18KpGUcqxdzDXB7fcM0F1PmjAkTklFWN5SxRtT7eq8oqY5zGfQAzs8DqQ4wGB8IlwuYxzlZQLBzjTGiMfU22qDNMAV_uq1NFkvjzxHbVqV8uwTdmwvo2zjrDBB16X3WdowZ0sUUj9Rda_7ZMsYCseAS_GGb7OtHOqnu8x1pHYN3SPwD8x0kvE5g_eRxeJchOj3PSPB6k1o3XX0IPkuFHp8XXXdn1_Nboh4J5713eAO_m8j_dB6G6_YrxeeF4k8Yy22C3751xW41ixN1-AYjOp0O)

| | So much for freedom of the press – Biden’s team has made it clear that the President will NOT be taking questions after his press conferences. With his history of gaffes and embarrassing missteps, it’s no wonder his team is doing everything in their power to prevent him from speaking off-script.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxVUEFuwyAQfA25JTJrY8jBh7Zp-oGoV0RgHSPZ2ALcKHl915bbqhJasTPssDOugUpWJe58AwVwzqEuCl5AeeBoZHvkElEUKNsrq4rB3Iyx2Y_B9BjzwY7DrmtKLhBt0TonBAh1lUdXAR5VZVFxUtv1TZfzlFj5wuBMJ999zhiXceouHZ59THkMl09qUzZ5TnThVQ1K1PxYy1JJKFVVs_JMKicoGNRzHvSAzs8DITgY329gGudokcCrU8ZUyoh9sL02w9T79rE9stQafwur2mob9kvRnflC_RhnnRCDzp1P2o4hYfwy2RO1Gk8_KmPIGDKJ0A_78Lx-xPbjVCqidei9W4j_YFpBBiKi9ZOn4UPC4PQ8EwFiFxs33X3f-1RLCvy2-Fpj3tZvmHxlAJ13tAOsicKfz9Nw3z9jeF8oeKOaHxP-vtskDltYwOTpG_mcoK4)

| | If you’ve chosen not to get the vaccine, you’re not alone. Check out conservative commentator Lisa Boothe’s article in Newsweek. She points out how vaccine mandates are senseless and immoral. More importantly, she states that the “government does not own us.” Be sure to give it a read... and if you’re feeling brave, bring it up at Thanksgiving dinner.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jimmy=20Fremgen?=
subject: Grateful & Invigorated >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE JIMMY FREMGEN FOR CONGRESS CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE
body:
I just want to say how grateful I am for you and this amazing community. Plus - I've got some guides for the weekend! | |
---
| | |
### I hope you're enjoying your holiday.
I wanted to take a second and tell you _**thank you**_. I'm so grateful for you and for this beautiful community of Sacramento.

My team and I started our morning at the [Run to Feed the Hungry 5k Marathon](https://jimmyfremgen.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5d6ec865a0183dc1741ede23a&id=c3c038d75e&e=c4fbacefe0), with 27,000 of our favorite neighbors. It was a great start to a day all about gratitude and community.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| If you're like me you're probably making your weekend plans around your work and family schedule. If you have shopping to do, I highly recommend [this incredible list of local Black-owned businesses in Sacramento](https://jimmyfremgen.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5d6ec865a0183dc1741ede23a&id=7b00010ec9&e=c4fbacefe0) for your #BlackFriday shopping.
---
|
---
| [#BlackFriday Shopping List](https://jimmyfremgen.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5d6ec865a0183dc1741ede23a&id=07bf726f01&e=c4fbacefe0 "#BlackFriday Shopping List")
---
|
---
| If you get out and about, take a selfie and tag me! I'll be at the Farmer's Market on Saturday, so I hope to see you there. Either way, I hope your holiday weekend is full of warmth and community.

With gratitude,

****
Jimmy Fremgen

name: Don Huffines for Texas
subject: I’m thankful for you
body:
and to be a Texan [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chititd-yuykitnyh-r/) Fellow Patriot, I love Thanksgiving and having the four-day weekend to spend with familyNothing is more important than the traditional family as it's the foundation of our society, of our religion, and of our education -- and we need to celebrate that this weekend._[Watch more of my Thanksgiving message here:](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chititd-yuykitnyh-y/)_ [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chititd-yuykitnyh-j/) I'm thankful for Patriots like you and to be a Texan. Without you, it's impossible to preserve the liberties and values that make the Lone Star State so great.From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving! God Bless you and God Bless Texas, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-chititd-yuykitnyh-t/) Don Huffines for Governor

name: Glenn
subject: Wishing You a Happy Thanksgiving
body:
Friend,Thanksgiving is one of my favorite times of the year.Across our country, family and friends are coming together to celebrate and give thanks.

I'm blessed to represent our great community in Congress and live in the greatest country in the world. Needless to say, I have a lot to be thankful for.

Thank you for your continued support as we work together to deliver a more prosperous future for all.From my family to yours, I hope that you have a very Happy Thanksgiving. Sincerely,
Glenn

[](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-chjotl-yddjllujiu-r/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-chjotl-yddjllujiu-j/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I am so sorry...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter -- I hope you had a great Thanksgiving.

I'm sorry to reach out right now. Please know that I hate writing this -- I'm only doing so because what I have to say is important.

Here's the deal. Thanksgiving directly lined up with my End of Month deadline, and it throws a giant wrench into our budgeting.

My math shows because of this lost day of reaching out to supporters and contacting potential donors, my team is about $47,000 off from hitting our goal.

**$47,000, Peter.**

This money could go directly to opening more field offices, contacting more voters, financing our day-to-day operations, developing a robust research and data team, and doing everything we can to ensure Florida doesn't fall under the control of Schumer and Pelosi.
**And that 's why I'm reaching out today, Peter. ****[Will you PLEASE chip in whatever you can today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58877832:JgYYOO2UN:m:1:3298722022:162ACF6C3CBE47B697574F1435AA199B:r "Will you PLEASE
chip in whatever you can today?") Our grassroots operations are literally financed by folks who give $25, $50, or even $100 here and there because they believe in something bigger than themselves. They believe that when we all work together, we can make a difference.**
Please, Peter., will you help me make a difference?

Thank you,
Marco Rubio
---
| | | [MAKE A DIFFERENCE WITH MARCO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58877832:JgYYOO2UN:m:1:3298722022:162ACF6C3CBE47B697574F1435AA199B:r "MAKE A DIFFERENCE WITH MARCO")
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58877833:JgYYOO2UN:m:1:3298722022:162ACF6C3CBE47B697574F1435AA199B:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58877833:JgYYOO2UN:m:1:3298722022:162ACF6C3CBE47B697574F1435AA199B:r "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio
---

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, Sometimes in the most challenging of times we also see what makes our community so strong.
Peter,Sometimes in the most challenging of times we also see what makes our community so strong.**The horrific attack in Waukesha has been a blow to all of us. Our hearts go out to the victims and their family and friends who are reeling from this incomprehensible tragedy.** Even in darkness, it is important to find moments of gratitude and thanks. This week, we saw first responders run into danger to protect our neighbors, we saw nurses and doctors step up to assist, and law enforcement officials work to serve and protect our community.**I am proud to live in a place where we can find people exemplifying grace and courage even in the most difficult times. That is why I am grateful to call Wisconsin home.** Wishing you and your loves ones moments of light, grace and gratitude this Thanksgiving.Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zwiuuy-idtjvlhlh-r/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zwiuuy-idtjvlhlh-y/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zwiuuy-idtjvlhlh-j/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zwiuuy-l-i) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

MAILING ADDRESS:
STEIL FOR WISCONSIN
1818 MILTON AVE. #1448
JANESVILLE, WI 53545 [Read our Privacy Policy](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zwiuuy-idtjvlhlh-t/) You are receiving this email as you are subscribed for expressing interest in campaign updates from Steil for Wisconsin Inc.

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Assaulted 4 times for exposing Antifa
body:
I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I’ll
_Sponsored message_
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first civilians savagely beaten by lawless Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I’ll be far from the last. **_[That’s why I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me fund my landmark lawsuit that will bring Antifa and their members to justice.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zghpl53aoqbnrc9i1v4i0pdo79sdu73k1oca808o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) _** **You see, I was at Antifa’s “ground zero” in the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they’d caused havoc before. I went to an Antifa “protest” as a journalist, to document and report on the event. As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry and looking for a fight. Most of them wore masks -- and not the kind we’re forced today because of coronavirus. They wanted to act like criminals without getting caught. Many had on helmets and makeshift armor. Some carried weapons like metal pipes, chains, crowbars, and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening. ** But I didn’t go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. “F*** you, Andy Ngo!” and “Go home, fascist!” I tried to escape, but it was too late. **Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. ** Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could’ve ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. **And now, we’re watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country.**
**[Will you donate $35 or more to help me cover the costs of my lawsuit against Antifa?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhrl68ra4l54t80jcobnsctlc341q4uegou90hm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs)** This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I’d get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It’s not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa’s nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It’s so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. [_**That’s why I hope you’ll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my landmark lawsuit against Antifa and their members.**_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3jrgvna6tnpc0ke6dc0rndraklveri9iq6op8eo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they’ll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that’s not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. _** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It’s a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they’ve been right! **For the most part, they’ve gotten off scot-free.**** ** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we’ve seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. **So now I’m taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. ** And, as I mentioned, we’re suing Portland’s Antifa Chapter. We’ve made a lot of progress in this case, but we’re far from victory. [**_You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today._**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1vb8tdm6a2p2tn6tek5gt3u9r7rk1no2umeb36o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) Though I’m seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won’t. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. [**_Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to fund this critical lawsuit?_ ** ](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zof08ik807j7r9f3joag3tokv0jo8vqhnfvrhns0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) Please don’t wait – if we don’t fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America’s troubles with Antifa aren’t over-- _**they’re just beginning**_. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out.[ **Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsclblrb7srt5r4qdmqukthoo0ae9lj866hctglo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z77hfln4ehg6gk3e59201reptrnugr6ssn9iv3r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbrivb25rni22uvu8kv66pkfn1rtfepnr466eea0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9kfmgv2pgn2rukivvkl7bsatecv7sia1lp4ue40_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjbrtg5re1t9o7tqoth7635ibtk913h071fo2nqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62pr0c5h2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

Somebody recognized me and jeers quickly rose through the crowd. “F* you, Andy Ngo!” and “Go home, fascist!” I tried to escape, but it was too late. Projectiles started flying. Then came the fists. Before I knew it, I was being punched, kicked, and hit with flying objects. I tried to protect my head, but I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. Not to mention they stole my camera. What they did to me is unacceptable. But this last summer, it became much worse than I could’ve ever imagined as Antifa set fire to entire cities for weeks on end. And now, we’re watching Antifa and similar groups threaten mass riots and violence across the country. This is bigger than me alone. You see, after I got away from the mob, police finally showed up to question me, but my attackers stole all my evidence. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured the attack, clear as day. I hoped I’d get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, over a year later, my attackers are walking free. Portland police did nothing. No charges. No convictions. No justice. It’s not much of a surprise, though. You see, radical politicians have long-since bowed to the dangerous mob that terrorizes their streets. And now, as you and I are watching Antifa’s nationwide takeover, more and more politicians across the country are following suit. It’s so bad that the justice system is buckling under the pressure of threats of violence from these disgusting thugs. We have to stop them and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. Because Antifa wants the end of America as we know it -- and they’ll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that’s not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open anarchists who want to tear down our society and remake it in their own twisted vision. By any means necessary, Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. It’s a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they’ve been right! For the most part, they’ve gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this deranged terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we’ve seen, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continues to escape consequences. So now I’m taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. And, as I mentioned, we’re suing Portland’s Antifa Chapter. We’ve made a lot of progress in this case, but we’re far from victory. Though I’m seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won’t. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. Please don’t wait – if we don’t fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America, destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Andy Ngo Investigative Journalist P.S. I know firsthand that America’s troubles with Antifa aren’t over-- they’re just beginning. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhn4moag4j5f7guu1f2decfk5aquca5gq8cj7088_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62ob7chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ncagoeefe5ojergo5puidi4nrpkkonre0fdeno_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62ob7chh2bs)**_ [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlvdg5lbcdbav815h6b9li1vp1g43fgemjfpmdjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62ob7chh2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8k9v4ks0eu38sf2d74oiovsgr5bbd5pjeug5gi0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62ob7chh2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh0odag1qvkjfbthpunjv1ig4i8op7nrhfth6au8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62ob7chh2bs)**_
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlmkak2jp7e8t5cvdfqncp7cjm5ibag21nu5uo58_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi41cvrr1576u7fp84sabut1gmub3l4icr6os9eg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6ctie4ob1cti649fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1bm02mievav33p63nj6p53nl7obeakprm1v694g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62ob2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeg4najp1rm0scitrm8sqs6eu40669631mje1rvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62ob2cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgdf2h20ev99eckqnk98op45gevo3cf7jr7gck78_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh62ob2cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: DISCLOSED: The inconvenient truth our leaders aren't telling you...
body:
But I will.

| | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,

With a national debt of $28 Trillion, there's no question that our nation is in peril.

But that number is also not entirely accurate.

In fact, what if I told you that it's much worse?

Heck, just the other day I saw a meme on social media that said, "things are so bad the government has admitted UFOs exist... and no one cares."

As much as I chuckled when I read that, it resonated with me in a way that made me sick to my stomach.

Because if the government would just get out of the way, do their limited jobs, and defend our liberties, there's nothing WE THE PEOPLE could not accomplish.

Instead, politicians feed us only half-truths because they think they're doing us a solid, truly believing they know what's best for us better than we do for ourselves.

And it's not just Democrats, it's also Republicans.

Well, I'm going to give it to you straight Peter...

Our national debt being $28 Trillion is only a half-truth because the inconvenient reality is that we have over $200 Trillion in promised benefits...and we just don't have it.

We don't.

And even though it absolutely sucks to be the one to lay it on you like that, you deserve to know the truth.

The American public deserves to know the truth.

I want to encourage you to not fall for the, "I have a plan to fix it" B.S. that others might tell you.

They're lying to you, plain and simple. And the sooner the American public knows the truth, the sooner we can start working on some REAL solutions.

As your next congressman, I plan to expose these lies so that we can finally get to work.

I want to provide a resource for you that gives you a detailed look into our national debt in real-time.

Click below to check it out.

---

Click below to check it out. | | | | | | | | | | For Freedom, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Jameson Ellis For Congress, 206A S Loop 336 W #309, Conroe, TX 77304, United States

name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Reminder: Get Involved!
body:
Support Geoff Diehl for Governor
| | | | |
---
---
BE A DELEGATE FOR DIEHL
---
| | |
---|---
|

On May 21, 2022, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold its state convention in Springfield, MA. At this event, Republicans across the state will vote for which candidates for statewide office best represent their values.

We are so honored by the outpouring of support Republicans have shown to the Diehl campaign. We hope that YOU will become a delegate for Diehl. How do you do this?

1. Check your Voter Registration: You must be a registered Republican by December 31, 2021 in order to be eligible. You can find your voter registration(and change it to Republican if you'd like) here: [Check My Voter Registration](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAOqUUHDiCJViMMO9s5XYo-YZH09nx3vT_m-c5_BOQhx1AOHVvZxz2ckQgIqQAs6mTw5LNj1Xj0LW8cxIslPyv4ngUZ6-jOr_lRCWn_ARAQNo-HSx7HtYJV9EImVsT2NSR135wbIwn_3lxeVvbybqGUhmJSX99Mf_MalDk0h-BPyqoNVk2s5RJfhRoybmMS8izIZ_Udp1KEab5ErskCQlw==&c=_TUIAuaQzpI7sIv47jV3Z76JCDrWmEPi9C7lDOQ45j2LuOocJVN6wg==&ch=aX4k_V013sv1Q5RZrpPPjn67VHvEcxzlfWAH7hIMj-diBD_CAr5n_Q==)

2. Join Your Local Republican Town Committee: These groups will hold meetings in February of 2022 to select the delegates from their town to the state convention. To find the contact information for your local committee, check out this link: [List of Republican Committees](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAOqUUHDiCJViMMO9s5XYo-YZH09nx3vT_m-c5_BOQhx1AOHVvZxzwb-KXA3Ms6ep4WQCXOG3Iuho8K_PXnPaT4DtItt7d85z1jusxoW3aOie0UAuyOTN13rFwir_GbyFwzHqnUj3ntXJMWiWhaRHbNDvEwdHrNK&c=_TUIAuaQzpI7sIv47jV3Z76JCDrWmEPi9C7lDOQ45j2LuOocJVN6wg==&ch=aX4k_V013sv1Q5RZrpPPjn67VHvEcxzlfWAH7hIMj-diBD_CAr5n_Q==), and select "Local Party Committees/Republican" from the drop down menu.
|
---
|
---
| JOIN THE DIEHL CAMPAIGN TEAM
---
---
You can also get involved in supporting Geoff for Governor by spreading the word to your contacts around the state to follow his campaign, and joining in the movement.
The Diehl website allows voters to subscribe for campaign updates, see upcoming events, groups to join and volunteer, and, there's even a Spanish version of the site for our Spanish-speaking friends who want to learn about Geoff's campaign.
Check out the website here:
---
| [Diehl for Massachusetts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAOqUUHDiCJViMMO9s5XYo-YZH09nx3vT_m-c5_BOQhx1AOHVvZxz8BQv63uPx9nG-ppk2goL3gMU4pT33c_tnyFek9FdzpToyk-OrwerxkOgOb4mNaDkhNf3pQxwCbYYOs8euSKlEvav_e_As5eoQ==&c=_TUIAuaQzpI7sIv47jV3Z76JCDrWmEPi9C7lDOQ45j2LuOocJVN6wg==&ch=aX4k_V013sv1Q5RZrpPPjn67VHvEcxzlfWAH7hIMj-diBD_CAr5n_Q==)
---
| |
---
---
| DONATE TO DIEHL
Contributions to the campaign help us spread our message further across the state. Please donate if you are able:
By check: Diehl for Massachusetts, 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606,
or
Online: [Donate to the Diehl Campaign ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAOqUUHDiCJViMMO9s5XYo-YZH09nx3vT_m-c5_BOQhx1AOHVvZxzz_ue1VHZeSYtQfcF8E42wvgEcGa6C1MXefjFsfFpL7tLvYQhYgDlBUfVC8X0QTc_H4a9nqFU-saSrUMgZwHTXgvozoV0A7y4ohCxZoI1FLHWM32t_0f8rk6pQiZP7tMgg==&c=_TUIAuaQzpI7sIv47jV3Z76JCDrWmEPi9C7lDOQ45j2LuOocJVN6wg==&ch=aX4k_V013sv1Q5RZrpPPjn67VHvEcxzlfWAH7hIMj-diBD_CAr5n_Q==)

---

---
|

| | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbtkmada44kjv71cca5aunl1n1cvhg8t68f00hvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh61o32cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6hkkc3j4vldjjqqoh1buppvpplai18vquaak38o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh61o32cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsoctmhf9u7j36psh76bc3ndvpgqpduf8n1pgf3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjh61o32cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Friend, I hope you enjoyed your Thanksgiving this year.

_Did you know that this year is predicted to be the most expensive Thanksgiving in recent history? _

You can thank Joe Biden for that.

His reckless spending and irresponsible energy policies have led to skyrocketing prices for things like your turkey, your vegetables, and the fuel you need for those long drives to visit family.

But even with record inflation - Biden hasn’t learned his lesson.

He just signed the pork-barrel, frivolous “everything is infrastructure” plan that will no doubt drag our nation down, increase inflation even more, and bring us all one step closer to becoming a socialist nightmare.

That’s why I’m fighting in Washington - to stop all this nonsense. And it’s why I need you on my side right now as we approach our end-of-month deadline.
_
_**_I’m setting a BIG goal of raising $25,000 before 11:59PM on November 30th. Will you help me reach it by chipping in now?_**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztgq5n3l9nbtdvta47morb6vknb7015t0b7pjdq8_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi0ic3fuj20ivpdn951cre8iu2cgd7naho32tqq8_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zogsslasu1jelmsqliko6i28tilqtr57d3h86ra8_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6r8j51g43pogh6jfhfm19gc3qr6uugeoloeugdo_)
_**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_
_Friend, you know me._ And you know exactly how hard I’ll fight to end the out of control spending of these leftists who want to destroy this nation.

This year alone, I’ve exposed Anthony Fauci as a fraud, I’ve stood up to Joe Biden’s fake “relief” bills and “infrastructure” plans, and I’ve called out big tech for their biased censorship.

I’m not afraid of the tough fights.

_I’ve stood consistently for freedom regardless of which party had power. And I’m not to stand by and watch the liberals take our nation further down this dangerous path while they still have control._

But I need you to continue our fight, TAKE BACK THE SENATE, and reject the socialist policies that are making everything - even our Thanksgiving dinners - outrageously expensive.

**Please, chip in what you can before the end-of-month deadline:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3247937/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvud7dpg19imjsqvh1ka97ocqm9ksbjblpkpusi8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrq4t1jm4o78dbhmui3ccbkmuprb9j2c5jm9pj7cmg78dt7slonbdumeuqn4thl6ng78cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equcoj1ctiecpr34lonbdulmkoj9dblmng74ttme1piasblmv8nacjlmnijfddkccin2tdnqorr7cbl6eonbo3k60hiasblmv8ncdf4249pb8j0c9i68p32cdh238h1e8he4933cpjm9pj4cdj62oh5u)**

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Our democracy will continue to be at risk if more insurrectionists are sent to represent our communities in state and local legislatures -- or worse, Congress -- next November. That's why we need leaders who will stand up for our democracy every day and protect every American's right to freely make their voice heard at the ballot box.

**Friend, we need leaders like Conor Lamb.**

**[To help him get ahead of his opponents, we set an end-of-month fundraising target that we have to hit by midnight on the 30th, but we're still $11,287 short of reaching our goal and staying on track ahead of the new year. name: American Update
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8186%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nWQvDbV7zJyfYB5X%2b2d%2fdw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18353%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vEQohDHq%2fxhDGqROjtqEPA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18354%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U9OUyuhdd6n8uiFEJmV8iA&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18365%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DGtDGQldMIkJfgxg4HPh4Q&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tWtdBDX1GVz06kej7w0Ytg&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18365%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DGtDGQldMIkJfgxg4HPh4Q&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c18367%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lNTMrOPOv3Vcl5QoD%2b6iwQ&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8186%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nWQvDbV7zJyfYB5X%2b2d%2fdw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8186%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nWQvDbV7zJyfYB5X%2b2d%2fdw&sysid=1)

name: Jane Hope Hamilton
subject: I want to hear from you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hamilton Congressional Exploratory Committee
body:
Special interests don’t influence my agenda -- but you do! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39023757/318062300/308357184?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2UxNjkyYy1jNzRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHv9oqcwTcJ6dBQrun2sZxjthbZ9t1-mTKlNpCwHP2s=&emci=b70e34cb-a5db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6ce1692c-c74e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) | Peter, From the streets of Dallas to the halls of Capitol Hill, I’ve been fighting for years to make life better for working people. That’s who I’m keeping in mind as I explore a run for Congress. From students to seniors to working moms like me, we deserve leaders who truly put our needs first. **Special interests don’t influence my agenda -- but folks like you do! That’s why I want to hear from you about your priorities and what you want Congress to get done.** [**Will you fill out this 2-minute priorities survey to let me know what’s on your mind? Your input is enormously helpful as we consider a campaign here in Texas’s 30th District:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39023759/318062302/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2UxNjkyYy1jNzRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHv9oqcwTcJ6dBQrun2sZxjthbZ9t1-mTKlNpCwHP2s=&emci=b70e34cb-a5db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6ce1692c-c74e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39023761/318062304/1973621832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2UxNjkyYy1jNzRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHv9oqcwTcJ6dBQrun2sZxjthbZ9t1-mTKlNpCwHP2s=&emci=b70e34cb-a5db-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6ce1692c-c74e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=25686233) For me, health care looms large. I have two kids under seven, and monthly premiums keep going up and up -- not to mention the high cost of prescription drugs. And as someone who has personally experienced police brutality, I know we have to pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to ban the worst police abuses like chokeholds and no-knock warrants and make sure all of our kids can walk our streets safely. Connected to all of this is voting rights. We’ve seen it here in Texas and across the country -- hundreds of bills restricting our freedom to vote. **We’ve got to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the For the People Act to set national standards and stop the disgraceful voter suppression laws.** [**Those are some of my priorities -- how about you? clean_body: Special interests don’t influence my agenda -- but you do! | Peter, From the streets of Dallas to the halls of Capitol Hill, I’ve been fighting for years to make life better for working people. That’s who I’m keeping in mind as I explore a run for Congress. From students to seniors to working moms like me, we deserve leaders who truly put our needs first. Special interests don’t influence my agenda -- but folks like you do! That’s why I want to hear from you about your priorities and what you want Congress to get done. For me, health care looms large. I have two kids under seven, and monthly premiums keep going up and up -- not to mention the high cost of prescription drugs. And as someone who has personally experienced police brutality, I know we have to pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to ban the worst police abuses like chokeholds and no-knock warrants and make sure all of our kids can walk our streets safely. Connected to all of this is voting rights. We’ve seen it here in Texas and across the country -- hundreds of bills restricting our freedom to vote. We’ve got to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the For the People Act to set national standards and stop the disgraceful voter suppression laws. Thank you and all the best, \-- Jane = | Thank you so much for your support. I'm Jane Hope Hamilton: a battle-tested activist and fighter for the people. |

My fundraising deadline was yesterday, and I missed the goal by only $5,000... I was crushed when I heard the news.

**But I 've extended it for 30 minutes because I believe in our team and your dedication to our fight to take back the Senate!**

name: Team Bridie
subject: Rep. Stefanik kicked out of Harvard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39026813/318075873/-442285112?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211126harvard_tb_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzUyN2IxNC1jZDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DJ19fLtABb2d6WMc2oTiDNmG308AVKrKzsfNe4d6jEQ=)
---
Friend, Six days after the Jan. 6th insurrection, Forbes reported that Rep. Elise Stefanik was removed from her role on one of Harvard University’s advisory committees. _Of course_ , instead of taking responsibility for her own actions, Elise lashed out at her alma mater like a kid caught in a lie. The Dean of the Harvard Kennedy School of Government made it clear that removing Elise from its advisory committee wasn’t about partisan politics, but instead about her lies to the American people. In his words: “Elise has made public assertions about voter fraud in November’s presidential election that have no basis in evidence.” | **As Forbes said, Harvard’s message was “intended to be an unambiguous leadership lesson to both its students and the nation. Don’t be a Stefanik.”**
---
While Elise was elected on the promise to be a Republican with some measure of willingness to be independent, she has shown she has none, even when it relates to representing the values of our community. She doesn’t even stop at spreading dangerous lies about the election that fuels riots and domestic terrorists.
**Now, she’s facing the consequences. She lost out on corporate donations, lost her position at Harvard, and next — with your help — she’s going to lose re-election.**

clean_body: | = Friend, Six days after the Jan. 6th insurrection, Forbes reported that Rep. Elise Stefanik was removed from her role on one of Harvard University’s advisory committees. Of course , instead of taking responsibility for her own actions, Elise lashed out at her alma mater like a kid caught in a lie. The Dean of the Harvard Kennedy School of Government made it clear that removing Elise from its advisory committee wasn’t about partisan politics, but instead about her lies to the American people. In his words: “Elise has made public assertions about voter fraud in November’s presidential election that have no basis in evidence.” | As Forbes said, Harvard’s message was “intended to be an unambiguous leadership lesson to both its students and the nation. Don’t be a Stefanik.” While Elise was elected on the promise to be a Republican with some measure of willingness to be independent, she has shown she has none, even when it relates to representing the values of our community. She doesn’t even stop at spreading dangerous lies about the election that fuels riots and domestic terrorists. Now, she’s facing the consequences. She lost out on corporate donations, lost her position at Harvard, and next — with your help — she’s going to lose re-election. = **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Best, Team Bridie | Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US Bridie Farrell for US PO Box 166 North River, NY 12856 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
This holiday weekend has finally given us a moment to come together.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39026919/318076531/686715116?refcode=211126_FR_postthxgiv_B_FR_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmRiMmE2Yy1jZDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qXZNocKRhY1WjtDFGWLmZOW8e1e-IaOjMca1xRixlAA=)
---
Peter,

This holiday weekend has finally given us a moment to come together with loved ones to celebrate and reflect on what we are truly thankful for.

Thanksgiving is one of those uniquely American holidays that everyone adopts and celebrates in their own way--from Friendsgivings to Turkey Trots. Since most of my family members live in Ecuador, Thailand, or India and our preferred version of football is fútbol, this holiday has always looked a little different for my family.

What we all share is the sentiment of thanks. To give thanks for what we have and what we have overcome.

I am thankful for the sacrifices my parents have made for me. I am thankful for the life they have helped me build. And I am thankful for their understanding as I turn the basement into campaign headquarters.

I am thankful for the support you all have given me. I am thankful for the faith you have in me and my abilities. I am thankful for you taking the time to listen to my message, follow my journey, and make my run for Congress possible.

I am thankful for each and every dollar donated to the campaign. Every cent is reinvested right back into my incredible team and this incredible effort to finally bring change to Congress.

clean_body: This holiday weekend has finally given us a moment to come together. | | | = Peter, This holiday weekend has finally given us a moment to come together with loved ones to celebrate and reflect on what we are truly thankful for. Thanksgiving is one of those uniquely American holidays that everyone adopts and celebrates in their own way--from Friendsgivings to Turkey Trots. Since most of my family members live in Ecuador, Thailand, or India and our preferred version of football is fútbol, this holiday has always looked a little different for my family. What we all share is the sentiment of thanks. To give thanks for what we have and what we have overcome. I am thankful for the sacrifices my parents have made for me. I am thankful for the life they have helped me build. And I am thankful for their understanding as I turn the basement into campaign headquarters. I am thankful for the support you all have given me. I am thankful for the faith you have in me and my abilities. I am thankful for you taking the time to listen to my message, follow my journey, and make my run for Congress possible. I am thankful for each and every dollar donated to the campaign. Every cent is reinvested right back into my incredible team and this incredible effort to finally bring change to Congress. = If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: __= __= Forever Thankful, Victoria ********** ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress**************** If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable. That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families. Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward. = ____= | || || ** Victoria for Congress P.O. Box 7476 Arlington, VA 22207 United States | | Paid for by Victoria for Congress

clean_body: $1,000. | = | = = Peter, The truth is, we are on the cusp of one of the most important midterm elections in modern history. This is a do-or-die moment for us, so every contribution is critical here. Your donations help us support Democrats fighting for Joe Biden’s Build Back Better agenda — and more importantly, Democrats willing to protect the president’s progress from right-wing attacks. The good news is we’re almost there — $257 to go! But we can’t slow down for a single moment. name: Eddie Geller
subject: Workers are coming for you, Jeff Bezos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39027172/318077728/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211126blackfriday_EG_main_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMyODQ2YS1jZTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2c5_CigPRihbPGc4NUXBfoEPuKvTNdJj9XSE1MRw82g=)
---
Today’s a _huge_ day for workers everywhere, friends.
In 20 countries around the world, on every inhabited continent, a coalition of activists from environmental, worker-rights, anti-monopoly, and data privacy movements (and that’s not even the full list), are staging a massive series of strikes and protests against Amazon.
**I’m so thrilled to see this challenge to corporate power, because it is direly needed. I stand with Amazon workers everywhere to #MakeAmazonPay, and I can’t wait to take this fight to Congress.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39027174/318077731/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211126blackfriday_EG_main_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMyODQ2YS1jZTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2c5_CigPRihbPGc4NUXBfoEPuKvTNdJj9XSE1MRw82g=)
---
The protestors' extremely reasonable demands start with:
1. **Pay Amazon workers a living wage:** Do I even need to explain this? Workers create profits and should be paid. Period.
2. **Respect their right to join unions:** Everyone should be able to join a union if they want to, without fear of intimidation and retaliation.
3. **Pay its fair share of taxes:** Remember how Amazon pays _nothing_ in taxes and Bezos reaps billions in profit? Yeah, let’s fix that so we can use those tax dollars to invest in our communities.
4. **Commit to meaningful environmental sustainability:** Amazon’s sheer enormity means that it touches almost every aspect of the global economy and supply chain. Taking meaningful — _actually_ meaningful — steps to mitigate their carbon footprint would have reverberations throughout the rest of the industry and the world.

**I’m proud to stand in solidarity with Amazon workers today, and I’d be even prouder to fight on behalf of them—and workers right here in Florida—in Congress.**
[**So, instead of contributing to the corporate-sponsored madness of Black Friday, will you make a contribution to my campaign so I can fight for workers everywhere?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39027175/318077733/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211126blackfriday_EG_main_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMyODQ2YS1jZTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2c5_CigPRihbPGc4NUXBfoEPuKvTNdJj9XSE1MRw82g=)
In solidarity,
Eddie

| Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. [_**Chip in now to help Eddie's campaign flip FL-15 blue!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39027176/318077735/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211126blackfriday_EG_main_SLA_ftr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzMyODQ2YS1jZTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2c5_CigPRihbPGc4NUXBfoEPuKvTNdJj9XSE1MRw82g=)

Pay Amazon workers a living wage: Do I even need to explain this? Workers create profits and should be paid. Period. 2. Respect their right to join unions: Everyone should be able to join a union if they want to, without fear of intimidation and retaliation. 3. Pay its fair share of taxes: Remember how Amazon pays nothing in taxes and Bezos reaps billions in profit? Yeah, let’s fix that so we can use those tax dollars to invest in our communities. 4. Commit to meaningful environmental sustainability: Amazon’s sheer enormity means that it touches almost every aspect of the global economy and supply chain. Taking meaningful — actually meaningful — steps to mitigate their carbon footprint would have reverberations throughout the rest of the industry and the world. I’m proud to stand in solidarity with Amazon workers today, and I’d be even prouder to fight on behalf of them—and workers right here in Florida—in Congress. = In solidarity, Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Box 1111 11507 Dr Martin Luther King Jr Blvd Mango, FL 33550-9700 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Charles Graham
subject: Native American Heritage Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39029737/318082152/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWZlYjZlOC1kMTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDMZn49eXqOsHLXo6w0LldaW5-L44E529gnuh4pacOE=)

| | Folks -- I bet some of y’all didn’t know this, but today is Native American Heritage Day. As a member of the Lumbee Tribe, this day is important to me. It’s meant to be a day to celebrate Native cultures and Native contributions to our society. But it’s also a reminder of how far we still have to go to ensure our people have a seat at the table. There are currently only five Native Americans in the entire U.S. House of Representatives, and zero serving in the Senate. It’s hard for Native folks to feel seen and celebrated when they don’t see themselves represented in their government or the media, and instead only see themselves represented as caricatures in sports mascots and Halloween costumes. I’m trying to change that by giving Native folks a voice in North Carolina’s General Assembly, and hopefully in Congress someday. I’m the only Native member of North Carolina’s General Assembly, and I would be the first Native Representative from North Carolina in Congress -- here’s what I mean by giving Native folks a voice:
* In the North Carolina General Assembly, I fought day and night to make sure the new state budget included $10 million for our state's Indian Tribes.
* I filed a bill to establish an American Indian Heritage Commission.
* I’ve been a staunch advocate for the Lumbee Recognition Act, which was just passed by the U.S. House. This legislation will give my tribe federal recognition and the resources they deserve. But one bill isn’t enough to revitalize my community -- we need more social programs and funding for that.

And I’ll be able to do so much more at the federal level. [**So if you’re looking for a way to give back today, or honor Native American Heritage Day, would you consider making a contribution to my campaign? clean_body: | = | | Folks -- I bet some of y’all didn’t know this, but today is Native American Heritage Day. As a member of the Lumbee Tribe, this day is important to me. It’s meant to be a day to celebrate Native cultures and Native contributions to our society. But it’s also a reminder of how far we still have to go to ensure our people have a seat at the table. There are currently only five Native Americans in the entire U.S. House of Representatives, and zero serving in the Senate. It’s hard for Native folks to feel seen and celebrated when they don’t see themselves represented in their government or the media, and instead only see themselves represented as caricatures in sports mascots and Halloween costumes. I’m trying to change that by giving Native folks a voice in North Carolina’s General Assembly, and hopefully in Congress someday. I’m the only Native member of North Carolina’s General Assembly, and I would be the first Native Representative from North Carolina in Congress -- here’s what I mean by giving Native folks a voice: In the North Carolina General Assembly, I fought day and night to make sure the new state budget included $10 million for our state's Indian Tribes. I filed a bill to establish an American Indian Heritage Commission. * I’ve been a staunch advocate for the Lumbee Recognition Act, which was just passed by the U.S. House. This legislation will give my tribe federal recognition and the resources they deserve. But one bill isn’t enough to revitalize my community -- we need more social programs and funding for that. And I’ll be able to do so much more at the federal level. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = \-- Charles | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress Charles Graham for Congress 479 Bee Gee Road Lumberton, NC 28358

Now that Jasmine’s grassroots momentum has scared Republican Madison Cawthorn out of running for re-election in his home district, we wanted to share why that means Jasmine is strongly positioned to win this race.
* **Organizing Everywhere is still the name of the game.** NC-14 is now one of the only competitive Congressional districts in the state. Jasmine is running the most grassroots campaign -- and supporters are responding. Since we launched, she has criss-crossed the district, holding events everywhere from parking lots to front porches and knocking doors in some of the reddest counties. We can’t afford to leave a single vote on the table, especially if we want to compete with potentially high Republican turnout in a midterm year. By the end of the year, our team will have knocked doors in all 15 counties in NC-14 -- as of today, we’ve knocked in 12 of them. Our monthly Days of Action have involved dozens of people joining us each month to knock doors, make phone calls, and write postcards. All of this is building the foundation of the largest grassroots organizing operation WNC has ever seen.

* **Jasmine is outraising the crowded primary field.** She is the most viable candidate and has the resources to win the primary and the general. We don’t rely on corrupt dark money from shady special interests that expect promises in return. We rely on our grassroots donors like you to help us meet our goals -- like the one we have coming up on November 30th. We have received grassroots donations from every county in Western NC and a total of more than 24,000 donations since we launched. Each one represents someone stepping up with us and this grassroots momentum is critical as we head into the heart of the primary season.

* **We need a candidate who can counteract misinformation and extremism with a message that brings people together.** This campaign is centered around creating a new kind of politics. From day one, Jasmine’s message has been based on love, hope, faith, and empathy -- paving a new path forward for Western North Carolina built on collaboration and an understanding of the issues that need to be addressed. We are sharing this message when we knock doors, through videos that have reached more than 1 million people, and through targeted outreach to voters across WNC.

This campaign isn’t Jasmine’s alone, **it belongs to all of us.** Together, we can erase the damage that Madison Cawthorn created and left behind. Together, we can invest in a better future for everyone here in our new district.
But we wouldn’t have made it this far without your support and we can’t stop now. With the expansion of our district, we need to continue pushing forward and doing our best to speak with everyone we can about the issues that matter most to them.
[**This is our campaign, and together we have what it takes to win. * * *
| \-------- Forwarded Message --------
From: Elaine Luria for Congress
Subject: [Internal] Campaign Memo
Date: Fri, Nov 26 Hi all, New concerns are arising as we grapple with Republican Glenn Youngkin’s gubernatorial win and Republican wins down the ballot. There are three major concerns moving forward -- setting the record straight on attack ads leveraged against Elaine, competing with her Republican opponents’ fundraising, and responding to the third-most powerful House Republican endorsing Jen Kiggans. **Attack Ads.** A group aligned with the GOP spent $2 million in attack ads prior to the House vote on the Build Back Better Act, in an attempt to pressure Democrats into backing down from voting for the social spending bill. One of the Democrats they targeted was Elaine. Elaine was not intimidated by the first wave of attack ads, so we are expecting that this group will spend more money flooding the airwaves with misinformation about Elaine and the legislation that she supports. **What do we do about it?** First, Elaine is not going to dignify these attack ads with a response -- we don’t want to amplify their rhetoric or lies any further. We will, however, be ramping up fundraising to amplify our own TV, radio, and email campaigns in order to set the record straight. We’ll also strengthen our grassroots organizing efforts by training volunteers to lead canvassing and phonebanking sessions. **Republican Fundraising.** Elaine currently has five Republican opponents vying for her seat, but two stand out -- Jen Kiggans and Jarome Bell. Reports indicate that fundraising numbers for Kiggans and Bell are neck and neck, and Elaine is outraising both of them so far. But with GOP endorsements coming in and the Republican primary just a few months away, soon there will only be one Republican challenger. That means by the time the general election rolls around, our fundraising numbers will be a lot closer -- and Republicans are feeling confident about reclaiming Elaine’s seat after Glenn Youngkin’s gubernatorial victory. **What do we do about it?** We’re going to continue fundraising aggressively in order to outpace our opponents and take advantage of the crowded Republican primary field. Right now, we have a sizable lead. And we need to grow our lead in order to show our opponents and national Republican groups at every FEC deadline that we have the resources that it takes to keep this seat blue. **Opponent endorsements.** Our final concern is that U.S. House Republican Caucus Chair Elise Stefanik just endorsed Jen Kiggans. She is the third-ranking member of the House. This will bring Kiggans attention from other national Republicans, boosting her name ID, and also bring in an influx of cash from folks who trust Stefanik and see her endorsement as something positive. **What do we do about it?** Kiggans is not yet the nominee, but we still want to be prepared. Last cycle, national Republicans spent _$3 million_ against Elaine, and she is in one of the most vulnerable seats in Congress.
---

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Elaine and I want to run a campaign that is as transparent as possible, so we decided to share an internal campaign memo with all of you. The memo below delves into attack ads targeted at Elaine, her opponents’ fundraising efforts, powerful Republicans endorsing her opponents, and how we plan on addressing these issues moving forward. If you don’t have time to read the full memo, one of the main takeaways is this: we need to ramp up our fundraising efforts if we want to stay ahead of the pack in the race for VA-02. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = \-- Kate | \-------- Forwarded Message -------- From: Elaine Luria for Congress Subject: [Internal] Campaign Memo Date: Fri, Nov 26 Hi all, New concerns are arising as we grapple with Republican Glenn Youngkin’s gubernatorial win and Republican wins down the ballot. There are three major concerns moving forward -- setting the record straight on attack ads leveraged against Elaine, competing with her Republican opponents’ fundraising, and responding to the third-most powerful House Republican endorsing Jen Kiggans. Attack Ads. A group aligned with the GOP spent $2 million in attack ads prior to the House vote on the Build Back Better Act, in an attempt to pressure Democrats into backing down from voting for the social spending bill. One of the Democrats they targeted was Elaine. Elaine was not intimidated by the first wave of attack ads, so we are expecting that this group will spend more money flooding the airwaves with misinformation about Elaine and the legislation that she supports. What do we do about it? First, Elaine is not going to dignify these attack ads with a response -- we don’t want to amplify their rhetoric or lies any further. We will, however, be ramping up fundraising to amplify our own TV, radio, and email campaigns in order to set the record straight. We’ll also strengthen our grassroots organizing efforts by training volunteers to lead canvassing and phonebanking sessions. Republican Fundraising. Elaine currently has five Republican opponents vying for her seat, but two stand out -- Jen Kiggans and Jarome Bell. Reports indicate that fundraising numbers for Kiggans and Bell are neck and neck, and Elaine is outraising both of them so far. But with GOP endorsements coming in and the Republican primary just a few months away, soon there will only be one Republican challenger. That means by the time the general election rolls around, our fundraising numbers will be a lot closer -- and Republicans are feeling confident about reclaiming Elaine’s seat after Glenn Youngkin’s gubernatorial victory. What do we do about it? We’re going to continue fundraising aggressively in order to outpace our opponents and take advantage of the crowded Republican primary field. Right now, we have a sizable lead. And we need to grow our lead in order to show our opponents and national Republican groups at every FEC deadline that we have the resources that it takes to keep this seat blue. Opponent endorsements. Our final concern is that U.S. House Republican Caucus Chair Elise Stefanik just endorsed Jen Kiggans. She is the third-ranking member of the House. This will bring Kiggans attention from other national Republicans, boosting her name ID, and also bring in an influx of cash from folks who trust Stefanik and see her endorsement as something positive. What do we do about it?** Kiggans is not yet the nominee, but we still want to be prepared. Last cycle, national Republicans spent $3 million against Elaine, and she is in one of the most vulnerable seats in Congress. Again, we need to amplify our fundraising even further in order to be ready for whatever the GOP throws as us. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = \-- Kate Kate Fegley Campaign Manager Elane Luria for Congress | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support Elaine for Congress, click below to make a donation! | | = Paid for by Elaine for Congress PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466 United States Elaine Luria is a retired member of the US Navy. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: American Defense News
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu9k45h53thfimt4htaanp37r0umr2uoa0naq6c0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjgm4pb4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1he5oj1dljmer7cohh65r6eob1mhi60tbimjie0tjimjgbbcbh69o60pj366rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbephimsqr2o3i65j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt2a1lumufcl09ms8mn3q1f1eauupurqie197m98_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjgm4pb4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zufff7nffbl8r41i86lvekrr7ghno0r6tbmfo560_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjgm4pb4cph2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdg2a6nvdcvrtb68dt04pd8bph2vdgvifkr0m4t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjgm4pb4cph2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq2hk78ciiqtjd98nfsirsn2tvmqu8smqs9pggmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjgm4pb4cph2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze5ss5svhg4dblrvbe4t3hh3g3m9rs83t79kg8t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjgm4pb4cph2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze4k5k6h8jb30djcau7on0j92btuem9ald84s7jg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjgm4pb4cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

No End in Sight on Higher Fuel Prices

The fuel prices continue to rise, and we're all facing larger bills to heat our homes this winter. Yet, we keep hearing that the Biden Administration is aware and willing to help. Still, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm can't name a single thing Biden has done to lower fuel prices. Instead, they continue to ban oil and gas leasing on federal lands and talk of shutting down another pipeline.
