Friend,

I’ve been trying my hand at poetry. **_Could you let me know if it’s any good after reading?_**

_Roses are Red, the Southern Border is open

Joe Biden’s incompetence is as deep as the ocean

If I had a dollar, I’d try my hand at saving

Before Pelosi came for the Socialist’s taking_

name: Team Kulla
subject: Giving thanks
body:
As a farmer, I’ve always seen Thanksgiving as the end of harvest season and the beginning of the rest-weeks before we start sowing next year’s crops. It has been our time to express gratitude. | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61a110a0f7a84c41164d238f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61a10f7ae7acdd661ede05cc%26ss_email_id%3D61a110a0f7a84c41164d238f%26ss_campaign_name%3DGiving%2Bthanks%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-11-26T16%253A57%253A48Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=MOMGrpY3stTCpAlL2BMKkyqO1OQ%3D)
---
|
## Giving thanks
---
---
|
---
| _Casey and his family were grateful to spend a holiday again with his parents and siblings in Lincoln City for the first time since the start of the pandemic!_
---
**From Casey:** As a farmer, I’ve always seen Thanksgiving as the end of harvest season and the beginning of the rest-weeks before we start sowing next year’s crops. As the end, it has been our time to express gratitude. This season, there is so much and there are so many I am grateful for:Many Yamhill County residents and Oregonians continue to struggle, and many parts of Oregon are either degraded or struggling to heal. **To those who work on their behalf, I give thanks.** Many of you are working when others are at rest. As a kid, I worked in kitchens, bakeries, and as a water system operator; I’ve seen you working while others play. **For you, I give thanks.** So many kids are unmoored, struggling with school and their peers, while teachers are stretched thin and worried about your students and parents. **You need help, and for your work, I give thanks.** Many parents, many kids, many families are missing their family, whether they’ve died from traffic or violence, whether they’re incarcerated or are missing or lost to COVID-19. **I mourn with you, and for your heart and advocacy, I give thanks.** Just as on the farm I look ahead to another year, so here in the county and across Oregon, we have so much work to do. I hope that today and in the days ahead, you can find gratitude and community. And then, we all set ourselves on the work again, of **building a state that works for and cares about every single Oregonian and the land that we love.****For you, I give thanks.****Casey Kulla**
---
|
---
P.S. Looking for a fun way to celebrate your gratitude for Oregon this holiday weekend? Download our **new free coloring sheet** , [“Birds of Oregon,”](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61a110a0f7a84c41164d238f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fcoloring-pages%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D61a10f7ae7acdd661ede05cc%26ss_email_id%3D61a110a0f7a84c41164d238f%26ss_campaign_name%3DGiving%2Bthanks%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-11-26T16%253A57%253A48Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=iY-A3TCi8H2oIBwiO_u9xppBsVE%3D) illustrated by Eugene-based artist Emily Poole! Color it with your favorite child or just on your own! If you use accurate coloring, you’ll end up with a rainbow of birds. Share your results on social media, and tag us: @caseykulla and @kullafororegon!

# EXCITING NEWS FOR ARKANSAS!
[](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=07d8016f26&e=624a44d946)
Peter,
I hope you and your family had a wonderful Thanksgiving. But I had to pause from eating leftovers to tell you about an **amazing 2 for 1 deal** I’ve got for you. Maybe even the best Black Friday deal you are going to find...If you haven’t already heard, I recently decided that I would be continuing my Make Arkansas First campaign by **entering the Lieutenant Governor’s race**. On November 9th, I made [this announcement](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=52bc7f57d6&e=624a44d946) and endorsed my long-time friend, Sarah Huckabee Sanders, to be The Natural State’s next Governor! So instead of making ONE historic decision at the poll next May, you now get to make TWO! I am overwhelmed by the outpouring of support over the last couple of weeks, but I can’t do it without [your help](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=8da6a63e46&e=624a44d946)!
| [CONTRIBUTE $5, $10, $25 NOW!](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=c18dffea55&e=624a44d946)
---
Peter, this is an exciting time for Arkansas! On May 24th you will get to help elect Arkansas’s first woman Governor and Lt. Governor! As you know, we are both strong conservative Christian women who never back down from a fight, and I am totally committed to helping Sarah stop the liberal Left’s woke socialist agenda from spreading into our State. And I will continue to fight to protect your constitutional rights and individual liberties just as I have done as Attorney General. Can you take a few seconds to [show your support](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=184cae8ac9&e=624a44d946) and help me start this campaign off strong?
| [DONATE NOW](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=1fd5c38039&e=624a44d946)
---
Sincerely,
| | | | [](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=959031fcdb&e=624a44d946)| [](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=edb0f2c41f&e=624a44d946)| [](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=7c4f34e9e1&e=624a44d946)| [](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=a4c480a6d1&e=624a44d946)

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Today is Native American Heritage Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39032962/318093486/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1077-ot-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzljZmM0NS1kYTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqZfBzsoP2-8kcHHxw275q6fvyuBSJZofDAF0O0IdQM=)
---
Peter,

Today is Native American Heritage Day, a national holiday that honors the history and culture of the first residents of the land we now call the United States.
On this special day, I encourage New Mexicans to join me in reflecting on Indigenous history and honoring the enduring legacy of Indigenous communities.
As governor, I am deeply committed to consulting and collaborating with the 23 Indigenous nations, tribes, and pueblos living in New Mexico, all of which contribute so much to our state's beautiful multicultural identity.
I promise to keep working to right the wrongs of past generations by respecting the sovereignty of Indigenous nations, supporting the well-being of Indigenous communities, and lifting the voices of Indigenous people wherever I can.
Our nation's past is not easy to reckon with – it includes devastating pain and suffering for Indigenous communities – but I hope in teaching the next generation of leaders about our most grave injustices and the indelible contributions made by Indigenous peoples to this country and this state, we can work toward a brighter future for us all.
Sincerely,

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b59710d7-cc4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/dc9cfc45-da4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzljZmM0NS1kYTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqZfBzsoP2-8kcHHxw275q6fvyuBSJZofDAF0O0IdQM=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

body:
Postmaster General DeJoy will not rest until he's dismantled the U.S. Postal Service
| | |
---
Friend, Postmaster General DeJoy will not rest until he's dismantled the U.S. Postal Service brick by brick.
**We cannot stand idly by as DeJoy cuts post office hours and raises prices on postage for letters and other vital mail services. We must protect the USPS – and we can't afford to wait. **
**[That's why I'm reaching out to you to act right now: Will you sign my petition to protect the U.S. Postal Service?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39033504/318095949/1313227775?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1799-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBiYThmZC1kYTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9kFyq-8VNQud9ANgVJxql-EFGYMvGrEiLrhCQC9pI8=&emci=facc76c4-044c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=280ba8fd-da4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100)**
Protecting the U.S. Postal Service means protecting small businesses. Protecting the delivery of lifesaving medication. The ability to reach out to loved ones. And what has proven to be so crucial last year, the right to cast your vote by mail. Millions of Americans mailed in their ballots in the last election, and DeJoy wants to make sure they won't be able to do that again.
**So I'm looking for 10,000 Democrats to join me in protecting the USPS from the blatant attacks of the insufficient and inexperienced Postmaster General DeJoy.**
**Our petition closes at midnight, so I'm relying on you to add your name now:[Will you sign right now to protect the U.S. Postal Service?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39033505/318095950/1313227775?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1799-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODBiYThmZC1kYTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9kFyq-8VNQud9ANgVJxql-EFGYMvGrEiLrhCQC9pI8=&emci=facc76c4-044c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=280ba8fd-da4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100)**
Thank you,

Val Demings

We know you’re probably getting a TON of Black Friday emails, Peter, so this is just a quick note.
**What’s better than a big sale?** _Delivering honest, compassionate leadership for Tennesseans._
About 11 months from now, we have a chance to do just that and end the divisiveness plaguing our state. Instead of Bill Lee’s reckless extremism and callous disregard for the lives of Tennesseans, we can elect Dr. Martin, who will listen to the science and, above all else, always stand up for ALL Tennesseans.
[_**But to be honest, we’re still not where we need to be at this point in the race if we’re going to defeat Lee and the GOP dark money machine. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: a personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I have to be direct, I’m worried. We _finally_ have a Democrat in the White House and control of the Senate -- with that comes an opportunity to make progress for American families. But I’m worried because all that progress depends on us holding on to our slim one-vote Democratic Senate majority. Senate control hinges on New Hampshire, where Maggie Hassan is defending a seat she won by just 1,017 votes. Republican extremists have already spent north of $4 MILLION attacking Maggie this year, and polls show that her race will be extremely tight. **That’s why I’m asking for your help right now:[Will you rush $5 or more to give Maggie the resources she needs to win and keep the Senate blue? I’m counting on you to come through before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39033974/318098735/-1803038125?refcode=e20211126_keg&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjg1ODliZi1lMTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iLBFKhbBKTw2dP7jTKc1CxZWZtzhcf803FoT5n5dAgU=)** New Hampshire is a solid swing state, and all eyes are going to be glued to Maggie’s race. **Don’t get me wrong: this race is 100% winnable, but it’s going to be extremely expensive and incredibly close.** Donating this far from Election Day may not seem like it makes a difference -- like your $5 is a drop in the bucket for a race that will cost tens of millions of dollars. But the money Maggie raises now helps inoculate her against attacks and builds the infrastructure to win. That’s why your $5 donation is so important. **[I’m asking you personally to please give anything you can before midnight to help reelect Maggie and keep the Senate blue. Truly, any amount makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39033975/318098736/-1803038125?refcode=e20211126_keg&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjg1ODliZi1lMTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iLBFKhbBKTw2dP7jTKc1CxZWZtzhcf803FoT5n5dAgU=)** Thank you,
Kirsten

name: Cole Muzio
subject: Plans Friday?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRONTLINE POLICY
body:
Sure, you can battle the crowded stores and fight for those Black Friday deals. OR. You can donate a few dollars to our fight to Save Our Students!
[](https://a.crowdskout.com/v1-1/email-click/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9mcm9udGxpbmUtcG9saWN5L21tX2VibGFzdF9oZl9ibGFja2ZyaWRheV8xMTE4MjE?b=eyJjc0lkIjo5OTE3MDM3MTEsImNsaWVudElkIjozMzgyLCJvcmdhbml6YXRpb25JZCI6IjIxODUyOTIiLCJzb3VyY2VJZCI6IjI4NzU3IiwiZW1haWxpbmdJZCI6bnVsbCwidjJFbWFpbGluZ0lkIjoxMTYxNCwiZnJvbSI6IjJkODg1NjZjLTUxNTgtNDVhNi04NTRhLWU1MGE1ZWI0YTFlOSJ9) | |
---
|
---
Friend,

The holiday season is officially upon us. Are you heading out for Black Friday shopping?

If you are, you are braver than me. I remember one year, my wife convinced me to go. That was a one time deal. From here out, any shopping on Black Friday will be done from a computer.

That, for me, is “Black Friday Winning.”

But nothing compares to WINNING the fight against the radical left’s indoctrination of our students. In that fight, however, we are up against it. The Left is already attacking our Save Our Students Agenda, and they will have more lobbyists, more dollars, and more help from the media to get their message across.

clean_body: Sure, you can battle the crowded stores and fight for those Black Friday deals. OR. You can donate a few dollars to our fight to Save Our Students! | | | Friend, The holiday season is officially upon us. Are you heading out for Black Friday shopping? If you are, you are braver than me. I remember one year, my wife convinced me to go. That was a one time deal. From here out, any shopping on Black Friday will be done from a computer. That, for me, is “Black Friday Winning.” But nothing compares to WINNING the fight against the radical left’s indoctrination of our students. In that fight, however, we are up against it. The Left is already attacking our Save Our Students Agenda, and they will have more lobbyists, more dollars, and more help from the media to get their message across. Just $5 will help us get our message out and recruit the manpower we’ll need heading into the 2022 legislative season and election season. We are Georgia’s Frontline against the liberal agenda that is sweeping the nation today. That’s the gift that keeps on giving. That’s some serious Black Friday Winning. Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

clean_body: I’m truly honored to be endorsed by such a great organization. | = Hey, it’s Nikki. I’m not sure if you follow me on Twitter. So I wanted to share some exciting news with you! Take a look: = We need more women in Congress. EMILY’s list trains, invests, and provides critical support to pro-choice women. I’m honored to have the support of such a great organization that truly understands the value of women’s voices. Women are the backbone of so many working families. So when women are put last in our priorities, everyone pays the price. That’s why I’m fighting so hard to get to Congress. Whether it’s closing the gender wage gap or protecting reproductive rights, I’ll work tirelessly to make sure that women have a champion in Congress who fights for them. But I can’t do it without your help. I need to raise $5,000 today to hit my daily fundraising goal and keep my campaign on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Your support means the world to me, \- Nikki | | Paid for by Nikki For Congress P.O. Box 5171, Springfield, IL 62705 www.nikkiforcongress.com Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country. Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. name: Nate Sandvig (iPhone)
subject: America’s “Black Friday” Blues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
| | | Friends,

Today is “Black Friday” 2021 – and it’s unlike any other in recent memory.

This week, our families paid more than ever to put Thanksgiving dinner on the table, thanks to runaway inflation that has caused prices to spike on virtually everything we consume.

**And as the American people head out today to begin Christmas shopping, they’re not just getting hit in the wallet at the register...**

_Due to the supply-chain issues, they’re running into empty shelves as well!_

This is Joe Biden’s America – inflation, supply shortages, labor shortages, weakened job growth, and longer lines. And the Democrats now want to DOUBLE DOWN on this insanity with their socialist spending spree.

We must stand united to TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY in 2022. I’m asking for your help.

Rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 donation to fuel our fight to WIN:

**$5 -- > [ https://secure.winred.com/sandvig-for-congress/e_blackfriday_111921/amount=5](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/a264310c461f6ccc/2e68a2cfe6f08106c3d6b838967d376c/37283)****$10-- > [ https://secure.winred.com/sandvig-for-congress/e_blackfriday_111921/amount=10](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/a264310c461f6ccc/3b0816fc0cc42de0c3d6b838967d376c/37283)****$25 -- > [ https://secure.winred.com/sandvig-for-congress/e_blackfriday_111921/amount=25](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/a264310c461f6ccc/1e9f79c0fa262770c3d6b838967d376c/37283)****$50 -- > [ https://secure.winred.com/sandvig-for-congress/e_blackfriday_111921/amount=25](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/a264310c461f6ccc/17d52dea8346d234c3d6b838967d376c/37283)****DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN-- > [ https://secure.winred.com/sandvig-for-congress/e_blackfriday_111921/amount=any](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/a264310c461f6ccc/feb79457b0f59e7fc3d6b838967d376c/37283)**

Thank you, as always, for being part of our fight-to-win grassroots team.

Nate Sandvig

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Growing Opportunity and Prosperity for All
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501155793%2501Newsletter%2b11-26-21%2b11AM%250115639.29895476.5546766.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501155793%2501Newsletter%2b11-26-21%2b11AM%250115639.29895476.5546766.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **November 26, 2021** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### Bringing Our Infrastructure Into the 21st Century
This month, we made major progress in our efforts to enact our full Build Back Better Agenda, including by passing and signing into law a historic [infrastructure modernization bill](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-passage-of-the-bipartisan-infrastructure-bill-including-key-maryland-priorities&redir_log=119460582231107). To grow our economy and generate more good-paying jobs, we've got to fix our crumbling roads and bridges, invest in transit systems across the country, and modernize the full array of our infrastructure to meet the challenges of the 21st century. This bill is a historic step forward. I was pleased to [welcome President Biden](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1458584376086863877&redir_log=652099686817375) to the Port of Baltimore to highlight what the infrastructure bill means for Maryland workers and families. This initiative makes significant investments to improve our transit systems, railways, clean water systems, roads, bridges, and tunnels. Importantly, it also makes critical investments in building the backbone of a more competitive, modern U.S. economy - including funds to expand broadband to end the digital divide and start building out our clean energy grid and electric charging stations. This bill also invests $17 billion in our ports nationwide - and that includes the Port of Baltimore, a huge economic driver in our state that delivers goods to our region and, along with them, more growth and opportunity for Marylanders. I worked to secure key elements in this bipartisan plan to support Maryland directly, including investments in a healthy Chesapeake Bay. I also fought to include [provisions I authored to reconnect communities](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-cardin-announce-inclusion-of-initiative-to-reconnect-communities-remove-harmful-infrastructure-like-baltimores-highway-to-nowhere-within-bipartisan-infrastructure-deal&redir_log=890897168751642) that had been split apart by 1960s federal transportation projects like the Highway to Nowhere in West Baltimore. And the bill includes a vital reauthorization of the $150 million annual federal contribution for WMATA for another eight years, policies I wrote to better protect our [frontline transit workers](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-napolitano-katko-introduce-legislation-to_protect-transit-workers-and-pedestrians-&redir_log=539637796981037), and my [bipartisan amendment to ensure taxpayer-funded infrastructure projects are soundly financed](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fsenate-passes-van-hollen-amendment-to-bipartisan-infrastructure-deal-to-ensure-secure-financing-of-public-private-infrastructure-projects&redir_log=239600663991349). Crucially, we also succeeded in adding [language to keep federal funding for the Baltimore Red Line metro project alive](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-cardin-revive-federal-support-for-baltimores-red-line-transit-project&redir_log=270439820299940), despite the Governor's decision to pull the plug on this key investment. Finally, even before the pandemic began, I was working to connect every student, household, and business with affordable high-speed internet and expand the use of clean energy - and those investments in this bill, [estimated at over $150 million for our state alone](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.whitehouse.gov%2fwp-content%2fuploads%2f2021%2f08%2fMARYLAND_Infrastructure-Investment-and-Jobs-Act-State-Fact-Sheet.pdf&redir_log=357108981276828), will help keep Marylanders at the forefront of our global economy.

In short: this new law will generate more good-paying jobs and strengthen our economy while improving the physical backbone of our country - and it will bring over $7 billion in direct investments straight to Maryland. To borrow a G-rated version of a statement from former Vice President Biden: this is a big darn deal! I was proud to fight for Maryland's priorities in this bill and to vote in the Senate to send it to the President's desk, and I was pleased to [join the President, Vice President, congressional colleagues, and others at the White House](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1460332748758003714&redir_log=413309884776373) for the signing of this landmark legislation.

With the passage of this historic bill, we're also moving full steam ahead to deliver the full Build Back Better Agenda. Greater prosperity for all requires expanding economic and job opportunities, cutting the rising costs that are financially squeezing so many, and accelerating the deployment of cleaner, cheaper, home-grown renewable energy - and our plan does just that. Last week, the House of Representatives kept the momentum going by passing the [Build Back Better Bill](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1461708640528830464&redir_log=705097635963373). This legislation, in tandem with the new infrastructure modernization bill, will build a more inclusive economy and lower everyday costs for the American people. It will deliver substantial tax cuts for middle-class families with children; provide for universal early education and affordable child care; fight the climate crisis with a transition to a clean energy economy; make in-home care for seniors and disabled individuals more accessible and affordable; lower the cost of prescription drugs; and so much more. And we will pay for these vital initiatives with long-overdue reforms to our tax system to prevent large corporations from avoiding paying taxes by hiding profits overseas and ensure that the wealthiest of the wealthy do more to invest in the success of all. From day one, I've been committed to bringing these investments directly to Maryland workers, students, families, and seniors. Together, these two bills will help bring a brighter future - with greater opportunity and shared prosperity - to our state and our nation. Now that the House has acted on the Build Back Better Bill, it's time for the Senate to get it across the finish line.
---
### Honoring Our Veterans and Those Who Now Serve
We owe an enduring debt of gratitude to our Veterans, to our active-duty service members, and to all of their families. This year on Veterans Day, I had the honor of [addressing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1458876259618938892&redir_log=96475898562375) Maryland Veterans from VFW Post 2562 and American Legion Post 268, and I had the privilege of paying tribute to the men and women - across Maryland and around the world - who have valiantly served our country. We must match our expressions of appreciation with real, supporting deeds. I'm committed to upholding the promises of a grateful nation to all of our Veterans and will continue the fight to ensure every Veteran has access to quality health care, housing, educational benefits, and job opportunities.

In that very spirit, I've been working with Senate colleagues to make crucial investments in our security both at home and abroad by helping assemble this year's National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). I've partnered with lawmakers on both sides of the aisle to include priorities within this bill to strengthen our national defenses - including Maryland's many vital military installations. In addition, the current version of this year's NDAA includes key priorities for our state and our service members, including a 2.7% pay raise for military and DoD civilians, an increase in parental leave to 12 weeks for all service members, a provision that allows for up to two weeks of bereavement leave in connection with the death of a spouse or child, and elements from my [SERVE Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-brown-introduce-bill-to-secure-service-academy-nominations-of-congressional-districts-states-without-representation&redir_log=284815536431277), which helps ensure that a congressional vacancy no longer results in the revocation of that lawmaker's service academy nominations. I am also proud to cosponsor a bipartisan amendment to this year's NDAA that would call for the placement of a memorial on the National Mall honoring those we've lost in Afghanistan, Iraq, and the broader fight against terrorists like Al-Qaeda and ISIS. In addition, the current NDAA legislation includes my [Foreign Service Families Act](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-sullivan-celebrate-us-foreign-service-day&redir_log=645326725128740), which will help ensure that the Foreign Service is able to attract and retain a world-class diplomatic corps by providing expanded career options and services to eligible family members. These are just a few of the key components of this essential legislation that we must get to the President's desk.
### Ensuring Marylanders Get Their Mail
In August 2020, I gathered with Federal Team Maryland in Baltimore City to highlight the unacceptable postal delays that have been plaguing thousands of Marylanders since Trump's Postmaster General, Louis DeJoy, took the helm at USPS. At that time, I had been hearing from constituents about medication shipments that had gone missing, small businesses that couldn't get products to customers, and people who were getting hit with late fees for bill payments that didn't arrive on time because of delays. That situation needed to change - and I've been working alongside colleagues ever since to demand real accountability and action from the USPS.

As Chair of the Appropriations Subcommittee on Financial Services and General Government, I convened a [hearing](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.appropriations.senate.gov%2fhearings%2fa-hearing-to-review-the-fy-2022-budget-request-for-the-usps-office-of-inspector-general-and-usps-service-issues-&redir_log=530443220061104) that included testimony from the USPS Inspector General and from Marylanders who have been negatively affected by poor service. The Subcommittee heard from Karen Meyers, a small business owner in Baltimore who relies on the USPS to receive orders from her customers. We also heard from Rania Dima with the National Federation of the Blind of Maryland, who detailed how these delays prevent her from receiving educational materials that she needs to learn Braille, as she loses her eyesight. Their testimony - and the testimony of other Marylanders - hit home in Washington, and demonstrated the real-life consequences of these delays to many of my colleagues.

At that hearing, I also urged the USPS Office of the Inspector General (IG) to investigate these problems and report back - and earlier this month, we finally got answers through a published report on this issue. I [joined](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fvideos%2f593446888561541&redir_log=836895172601393) members of Federal Team Maryland at the Dundalk Post Office to announce the results of that audit and to discuss next steps that would improve postal service in Maryland. The IG report reviewed the performance of nine post offices in the Baltimore area between October 2019 and July 2021 and provided a clearer picture of just how bad things have been. Post offices in Baltimore have received 3-to-5 times more service-related complaints than the national average. The Dundalk Post Office alone received over 160,000 reports of delayed mail during the twenty-one month period that was studied by the Inspector General's office.

But this report didn't just highlight the problem - it also offered solutions. The audit has provided a roadmap for how to address these issues and, among its recommendations, this report calls for a new plan for hiring and retention, a third USPS Training Academy in Maryland, and a system for ensuring that all USPS station managers report delayed mail and delayed packaging in the customer service system so USPS can keep track of issues that crop up - and fix delays as soon as possible. Management will be working to implement these recommendations and is required to have each of the proposed action items in place by the end of this month.

In addition to those efforts, I recently led members of the Maryland delegation in sending a [letter](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fmaryland-delegation-presses-postmaster-general-dejoy-for-update-on-readiness-for-holiday-mail-surge&redir_log=725944446571071) to Postmaster General DeJoy requesting a progress report on the Postal Service's efforts to ensure mail is delivered in a timely manner this holiday season. For far too long, Postmaster General DeJoy has wreaked havoc on our Postal Service and has undermined the critical mail services so many Americans rely on - and he must be held to account. That's why I was also pleased to see President Biden announce his plans to nominate Daniel Tangherlini to the U.S. Postal Service's governing board to help block further damage by the Postmaster General - [removing DeJoy must come next](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1461749335532740611&redir_log=249916274743373).

I will continue to monitor this situation closely, and I won't let up in our push to restore the quality service that our fellow citizens have come to expect from the USPS.
### Giving Thanks
One year ago, Thanksgiving came and went amid much isolation and mostly quiet celebration. It was the height of the pandemic and most of us were still separated from anyone outside of our quarantine bubbles. One year later, we are bouncing back. Thanks to the American Rescue Plan, we've been able to deploy life-saving vaccines to our communities and have helped our economy start to rebound. We still have a long road ahead - but I am thankful for how far we've come. I am especially grateful for our frontline workers, health care providers, and the scientific community who have been working around-the-clock to fight back against COVID-19.

The past year and a half hasn't been easy, but I believe that there is still so much to be thankful for, from family and friends to all of those who have protected our democracy, spoken truth to power, and advanced the vital mission of forming a more perfect union. And I am, as always, thankful to represent the great state of Maryland.

I'm also grateful to be able to offer assistance to the people of Maryland. As we enjoy this season of Thanksgiving, I want to highlight the news I recently received from two constituents. They reached out to my office because - after working with our team and us fighting for changes at the federal level - their student loans had finally been forgiven. I want to thank my own hardworking team for helping make this happen. For years we've been pushing for updates to the [Public Service Loan Forgiveness Program,](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15978QQQ29734200QQQ5546187QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.ed.gov%252fnews%252fpress-releases%252ffact-sheet-public-service-loan-forgiveness-pslf-program-overhaul%26redir_log%3d15422449697731&redir_log=714827075221969) and now Marylanders are finally seeing the results. Their stories - and the stories of countless other Marylanders who reach out to my office needing assistance, thanking staff, or sharing input - affirms my enduring belief that we can achieve real results when we work together in service of common goals that benefit our communities. It's in that spirit of partnership and progress that [I hope you will continue to stay engaged.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d15978QQQ29734200QQQ5546187QQQ7967967%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%252fcontact%26redir_log%3d475918421268285&redir_log=274941155261492)

Happy Thanksgiving!
Chris Van Hollen P.S. It is now Open Season for [Maryland Health Connection](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d0000.0000.0000.0000%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.marylandhealthconnection.gov%252f%26redir_log%3d621354806748293&redir_log=751945088951397) and the [Federal Employee Health Benefits (FEHB) Program](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fiqClickTrk.aspx%3f%26cid%3dSenVanHollen%26crop%3d0000.0000.0000.0000%26report_id%3d%26redirect%3dhttps%253a%252f%252fwww.opm.gov%252fhealthcare-insurance%252fopen-season%252f%26redir_log%3d382511640681373&redir_log=159931428251499). Make sure you have all the information you need to get covered!

[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15639.29895476.5546766.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---

The past year and a half hasn't been easy, but I believe that there is still so much to be thankful for, from family and friends to all of those who have protected our democracy, spoken truth to power, and advanced the vital mission of forming a more perfect union. And I am, as always, thankful to represent the great state of Maryland. I'm also grateful to be able to offer assistance to the people of Maryland. As we enjoy this season of Thanksgiving, I want to highlight the news I recently received from two constituents. They reached out to my office because - after working with our team and us fighting for changes at the federal level - their student loans had finally been forgiven. I want to thank my own hardworking team for helping make this happen. For years we've been pushing for updates to the and now Marylanders are finally seeing the results. Their stories - and the stories of countless other Marylanders who reach out to my office needing assistance, thanking staff, or sharing input - affirms my enduring belief that we can achieve real results when we work together in service of common goals that benefit our communities. It's in that spirit of partnership and progress that Happy Thanksgiving! Chris Van Hollen P.S. It is now Open Season for and the . Make sure you have all the information you need to get covered! "Facebook" "Twitter" "Instagram" "YouTube" |

name: Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
subject: For Black Friday, give the gift of safety..
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, Now that Thanksgiving has passed, frantic holiday shopping begins. Black Friday, especially, is a time to be sure you're getting all the best sales and deals for your family this holiday season. At Pride Fund, our focus today won't be on gifting our friends with the coolest designer shoes or newest gadgets, because we have the opportunity to help those around us have the gift of safety and security from gun violence. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/0EvctdEsObV723fzIbebhvYPNRNG9zvysEYWHrp1NGs=/1aGe17NfIrb_Fc9MeTyygIQr5or7nwAu7nPWGpXr8Rk=?refcode=2021&amount=25&recurring=yes) [_We can win the fight to secure gun reform now with support from grassroots donors like you. A gift to Pride Fund is a gift for gun safety. Will you donate today while you do your Black Friday shopping?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/0EvctdEsObV723fzIbebhvYPNRNG9zvysEYWHrp1NGs=/1aGe17NfIrb_Fc9MeTyygIQr5or7nwAu7nPWGpXr8Rk=?refcode=2021&amount=25&recurring=yes) At Pride Fund, we are working throughout the holiday season to make common sense gun reform a reality by continuing our advocacy, election, education, and lobbying efforts to push a gun reform agenda in Congress and to mobilize our supporters to stay involved in this critical effort. Help us to ensure an America where families are safe everywhere and anytime. Right now, Republicans running for re-election and Republicans who are running to defeat one of our gun safety democrats in office today, are raising tons and tons of money for their warchest for the 2022 elections. We have to start building our own warchest now in order to be prepared for the 2022 election, which will determine the control of the House and Senate. With slim Democratic majorities in both chambers, even a slight shift could give Republicans control of one or both chambers. [The holidays can be the slowest time of year for fundraising. Please help us raise the essential funds to keep our momentum going. Give the gift of safety by donating today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/0EvctdEsObV723fzIbebhvYPNRNG9zvysEYWHrp1NGs=/1aGe17NfIrb_Fc9MeTyygIQr5or7nwAu7nPWGpXr8Rk=?refcode=2021&amount=25&recurring=yes) In solidarity, Pride Fund |

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zc049tsjsrbtgkch5bc5440tk1mg342und38g79o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjimcoj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze1c5f2oejbvmnp0l7ikuad85f3flk0vs94k8rno_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjimcoj2c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5tp0v26vbkmke9tqq63p0u2jnpk3euer6pfbae0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjimcoj2c9h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsuiini5got75a8ooc2kkln6be4hj8g2b2gi4nt0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjimcoj2c9h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhtrvj4cjahcdm0v2pa5p9nqn93udsnv0af2d4o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjimcoj2c9h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsmsee35ou7203mt5j8cio9mt53d2m1tpv20acm0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjimcoj2c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zhv9t7t26296vo0e62i2j1adit5k93o48jinp03g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
I announced our campaign for Congress just a few weeks ago, and Claudia Tenney immediately went on the attack with lies and smears about my record--because she knows she can’t defend hers.

| _Josh Riley is a Democrat running for Congress to bring Upstate New York Square Deal values to Washington.**If you do not wish to receive important updates about Josh's campaign, please[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/cdf719fb-584d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/05710927-ed4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTcxMDkyNy1lZDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqEc7idRMkkClHyeS6camA2J-AonQodLJlRUQDLwyho=&id=106311268).**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39036130/318109364/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211126-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTcxMDkyNy1lZDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqEc7idRMkkClHyeS6camA2J-AonQodLJlRUQDLwyho=)

| Peter,

I announced our campaign for Congress just a few weeks ago, and Claudia Tenney immediately went on the attack with lies and smears about my record--because she knows she can’t defend hers. **And she knows we can win this race.**

In just the past two weeks alone, Claudia Tenney has voted against:
* Good jobs
* Middle class tax cuts
* Improved broadband
* Fixing roads and bridges
* Lowering prescription drug costs
* Universal Pre-K
* Expanding Medicare

**Maybe that’s a good record for the special interests lining her pockets, but it’s bad for working families.**

[**_I believe the purpose of public service is to improve the lives of others, not enrich oneself. I’m not accepting any corporate PAC money in this campaign. Instead, I’m relying on grassroots support from people like you. Will you chip in $5, $10, or more today? →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39036131/318109365/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211126-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTcxMDkyNy1lZDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqEc7idRMkkClHyeS6camA2J-AonQodLJlRUQDLwyho=)

With gratitude,

Josh Riley

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39036137/318109399/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDcwNzIzNy1lZDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k4fo8aw76kzzeMi-WPwCbLz4SHi0c3Gg0HOftUmptzg=&emci=c7f5050a-e34e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=04707237-ed4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)
---
Hello, I hope you had a relaxing and fun Thanksgiving with your family and loved ones. I'm thankful for all the quality time I got to spend with my family — including hunting deer with my son, Micah, and enjoying a wonderful meal with Julie, Carter, and Micah. (Our dog, Ella, may have gotten some table scraps.) Now, it's time for our campaign to get back to work for New Mexico and our country. That includes protecting our Democratic majorities in a tough midterm election, electing strong local candidates in New Mexico, and powering our work for a better future for all. **But all those things require resources, and my team tells me that we’re not on track to meet our November fundraising goal. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39036254/318109740/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODEwM2QwZi1lZTRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPULjJSngBIz2stGiMqWDc4sW67vx8iqSFFPqq1gOXA=)
Friend,

I hope you had a nice Thanksgiving and had the opportunity to spend time with family and friends.

Last week, Democrats in the House passed the **Build Back Better Act.** It makes the largest federal expenditure combating our climate crisis, ever; the largest expansion of affordable housing, ever; universal pre-K, an extension of the child tax credit, reduced premiums and expanded Medicare, and expands access to home care. In short, it's an absolute game-changer and I support the measures in this bill that directly help working families.

**Unfortunately, tuition-free community college wasn't included in the final bill.** In recent polling, about two-thirds of Americans support making college tuition-free, and a recent post-election focus group of swing voters in Virginia found that people mainly mentioned tuition-free college as a key part of the Build Back Better Bill.

Tuition-free community college, as well as debt-free 4-yr college, certifications, and trade school are one of the biggest, if not the biggest return on investment that we as a country must implement if we are to lead technologically. This is one of the key parts of the bill that I am personally eager to see implemented.

Congress needs leadership in science and technology education to advance the next generation of innovation. I’ll use my expertise in engineering to deliver solutions that work for all of us.

[**With our end-of-month deadline hitting on Tuesday, I need to ask you once again to help me pick up the pace with a contribution of $5, $15, or even $50. Will you chip in to help us close the $6,191 gap on our daily goal? clean_body: | = Friend, I hope you had a nice Thanksgiving and had the opportunity to spend time with family and friends. Last week, Democrats in the House passed the Build Back Better Act. It makes the largest federal expenditure combating our climate crisis, ever; the largest expansion of affordable housing, ever; universal pre-K, an extension of the child tax credit, reduced premiums and expanded Medicare, and expands access to home care. In short, it's an absolute game-changer and I support the measures in this bill that directly help working families. Unfortunately, tuition-free community college wasn't included in the final bill. In recent polling, about two-thirds of Americans support making college tuition-free, and a recent post-election focus group of swing voters in Virginia found that people mainly mentioned tuition-free college as a key part of the Build Back Better Bill. Tuition-free community college, as well as debt-free 4-yr college, certifications, and trade school are one of the biggest, if not the biggest return on investment that we as a country must implement if we are to lead technologically. This is one of the key parts of the bill that I am personally eager to see implemented. Congress needs leadership in science and technology education to advance the next generation of innovation. I’ll use my expertise in engineering to deliver solutions that work for all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. body:

---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39036384/318110421/-351336331?refcode=20211126_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2VkYmY5Zi1mMDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=voElT5siRtccIwFOkZn-GcLeEEOgRWFH5VNWtgsJVIo=)

Friend,

If I didn’t know better, I’d say Gov. Ron DeSantis and Texas Gov. Greg Abbott are holding a competition to see who can _**pass the most far-right policies.**_

They’ve both signed extreme abortion bans and un-American voter suppression bills into law -- and that’s just the start. Both governors _refuse_ to take climate change seriously, and their hyper-partisan stances are actively hurting Floridians and Texans.

**[Fortunately, my friend Beto O’Rourke is running for governor against Greg Abbott. Friend, can you take a moment and split a donation between Beto’s campaign and my own?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39036385/318110422/-351336331?refcode=20211126_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2VkYmY5Zi1mMDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=voElT5siRtccIwFOkZn-GcLeEEOgRWFH5VNWtgsJVIo=)**

clean_body: = Hey Peter, To flip TX-23 blue, we can’t let our foot off the gas -- so we need your help to raise $15,000 before the end of this month. = | = Election year is almost here, which makes hitting our goals more important than ever. Despite Texas Republicans’ gerrymandering, this district remains one of the most flippable seats in the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = Thank you for being a part of this team, Team Lira = | John Lira is the son of a Mexican American family of four in southeast San Antonio, a United States Marine Corps veteran, a dedicated father and husband, a devoted parishioner at St. Benedict’s Catholic Church, and a proud Texan. He's running for Congress because he believes Texans deserve more than political posturing. The Democratic House majority is hanging by a thread, and this is one of the most flippable seats in the country. We need all hands on deck to bring this thing home.=** | = To learn more please visit and follow us on and | Paid for by Texans for John Lira John Lira for Congress 1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120 #8096 San Antonio, TX 78220 United States John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Hi friend,

As you know, I recently launched my campaign for Congress, and I’ve put together a list of my flagship campaign priorities.

Many of the issues listed are also ones that Virginians and Americans have identified as important.

Before I set my agenda, I wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to check it out and make sure I wasn’t missing anything important to youー _[**friend, will you take a second to look it over?**](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=f805c59fcbf84138849ae952ba08222d&_e=h9QiRL9iQ97T6Nule3tL0BM_pqw6BTyq2WkzCuKwOGCpan99FuEaXJ_A7wfAVcJq8R9EKrmMORB9j3D4FT41wrgOvfGfncRM72PvbZyTwVMLZnvAxfVdmVwDTAqOvvkj-L9y2XxYsL_A809FBkpXDD6bGWebei5AgfHQGjBHVBA0Cyd5gLMIdXCRAkCnUOJx-pN_kSoyeK_64oFEh7Y_jNvf2vwOFqPvqJtMsvc8RkM1pTQiCMd2rKC_3c0SC2d4SNzXV_g1Kd1IaPXm1gCUYa1PZ7BuPLHYcXXde3khrsYac_e4LQ9G7ZWEZO_earePE73h9CPnVzoQ9rRjP3s25zfrxHAJ4nmVg25DrTclXYB77dLTw1bl2FO9cP6kY_AKKIqkWr8-wBk4GHoV3US0Vvp4wJtkQGooHshHdHxT7rXTZjMZrlJKfpzV8a4Cn6BMi8WDOriOYLW313rKqDa3mimCFsYQ0040n-kBvTZ4YjurfBbzsO8AfNsagmuqf8-8)_

name: Team Gansler
subject: Honoring Native American Heritage Day
body:
| Friend, On behalf of our entire campaign, Happy Native American Heritage Day! Today, we're taking extra time to celebrate the history and contributions of the incredible native communities right here in Maryland. In honor of this special day, we wanted to make sure you saw our petition calling on Governor Hogan to adequately represent Native Americans in our state's COVID data. [**Add your name today to help get Native American Marylanders the resources they need to fight the pandemic, immediately.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn_0kk2sIZD1RcgDoNoNMH39eD3Q7od7YQTh0He9uZLp5KUQkvxGwE8LD0tmzaJAccmq6Mg3rVjQSP9fQFOFqWzRXAZ18xzgrx04EJH_dQO5016LKBxuIkOKU7o7IF6C2VEsQTyFMrD89sxd74aEOCsczwOGbMQyUj7W9a0iVBu25exTjEnvf-m3fugcT-Zs09P40aeHk9ltcJgY4EUUZhrSIX87gwvDXRkvTkU3_KN-3t6hgdn3z9BVjE8HV461NLnGUJKMRB_YdPiY-6v9cUTgAM_QnXfAK__WnJOkFDPuKiy_X0xnooeihyjnNFyZ0g/3hc/ind9n3tcS1yd8iLrlf9bSg/h0/SgmxC1y3HeUZzEeiHxIeOsOWvyPU0osr9ew_lzjlq3s) Thanks, Team Gansler _\----Begin Forwarded Message----_

---
Hi friends, **Team Gansler is proud to wish all Marylanders Happy Native American Heritage Month!**
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn_0kk2sIZD1RcgDoNoNMH39eD3Q7od7YQTh0He9uZLp5KUQkvxGwE8LD0tmzaJAccmq6Mg3rVjQSP9fQFOFqWzRXAZ18xzgrx04EJH_dQO5016LKBxuIkOKU7o7IF6C2VEsQTyFMrD89sxd74aEOCs0exndQvdeBy-kXTcw2bVJ03axsRrZlCFGRvbv5iv1wzFijj-Z6F8xgbWybN7_JX6mOUy9FKnOqKi0lsfgGi-QKLEoU4vXzRmZQsucCkJXCbge0kyaYiIwesPmAI9YjFjuOnE5GPaOPyiIBovBcdDh-zrCiS3vpfRdNOV5UorLeI/3hc/ind9n3tcS1yd8iLrlf9bSg/h2/rhSao1f4b1SWPok-V5R2ycZX_bJM2VuY7wbvQdpJJ3c)
---
This is a special time to reflect, recognize, and honor the historical and cultural impact of Native American communities here in Maryland, and across the country. Tribes like the Piscataway Indian Nation, Piscataway Conoy Tribe, and the Accohannock Indian Tribe have enriched the quality and character of our state for generations. In celebrating this month, however, it's difficult to ignore the great challenges faced by these communities, in particular, the fight against COVID. Maryland is one of only 14 states that do not publish clear data on COVID's impact on the Native American population. According to the 2020 census, there are 31,845 people in Maryland who identify as American Indian and Alaska Native alone, with an additional 96,805 identifying as American Indian and Alaska Native in combination with one or more races. **Yet, Maryland lumps them together as "Other" in its COVID data, and** **without data, it is nearly impossible to get resources.** This failure will change in a Gansler Administration, but Native American Marylanders should not have to wait until 2023 to prove how they have been impacted by COVID. **[We're calling on the Hogan Administration to count and see Native American Marylanders, immediately.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn_0kk2sIZD1RcgDoNoNMH39eD3Q7od7YQTh0He9uZLp5KUQkvxGwE8LD0tmzaJAccmq6Mg3rVjQSP9fQFOFqWzRXAZ18xzgrx04EJH_dQO5016LKBxuIkOKU7o7IF6C2VEsQTyFMrD89sxd74aEOCsZ7MorwWNLC2sJyocjrvB7w26p18F8ziv-_A7o67BLpPRGAHDXRR-l2qFPJNjPHF58UmBfaGua0PRqCNG4lYoajbOYV8nWy5xmsFLSQs6QyhXRmONbQB6qAkZedGHbQPmDFY6BbjhZZQAHdoxlcsc1CYWhdvLBSba48JkgVBrl7E/3hc/ind9n3tcS1yd8iLrlf9bSg/h3/GWzNgrXbUZ7GZ0G_TzQL9Exnw7cTAk8hON8_4GTGG4M)**
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn_0kk2sIZD1RcgDoNoNMH39eD3Q7od7YQTh0He9uZLp5KUQkvxGwE8LD0tmzaJAccmq6Mg3rVjQSP9fQFOFqWzRXAZ18xzgrx04EJH_dQO5016LKBxuIkOKU7o7IF6C2VEsQTyFMrD89sxd74aEOCsv5SVeWPhIjh6ilooJF5KaupOrirCkXj92197WIrWSNvhJaj_fabBDPYjk5pL4ff0ifoeHnG4YrmqYUW9JktCTOLZ8wWNf583vKGQJs2ydhZUpMVQDrnYYG3g-rStz3HPDv1gSmrxiDzDsBV60Ca7DunCK4_o1-aFum1Cf_WSsVw/3hc/ind9n3tcS1yd8iLrlf9bSg/h4/oU3Nds6jVnYLE7OFVWKzbUv1TMoYIxsL1egt8CW1wOE)
---
**To Native American Marylanders all over the state: We see your strength and we join you in your joy, and we will name and work to correct the inequities you face.** Thank you, Team Gansler
---
[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzujofsD7r_JzqIYrW0irtn5fl73wKVjiQCNNAV97Ro57Qx4B4QyBQs7oZ6As5wYIxvlCiLcjgSy6TYWgjFoBH_sl2CzQp7ECxAuzo2_Xv0QR2a_R3IAoqZm6ph8YdlsBK_FULxUbvowqbAxUGxParaE8EHv-TuNk81vZ1p9hbPLzKnwihvGQeedzdCldbNaTvl4xTviHbbOKAD0ntg83XPo-0lgmV9FS9quBriTU3hixDxpJN3W4YZ_kAJuv5exp8GbIS-gmR8TVxsE_3_8r2TI0jNPwh6PKK-re9bStkAKmG3FgxFj43mrNQDkzZ2FkSgQ/3hc/ind9n3tcS1yd8iLrlf9bSg/h5/09aSg3Uq1rPy_3vHvIO8zEENrep7WVuz1e5hQ_WCeNM)

| | Well, this is exciting! State Senator Rob Wagner is so enthusiastic about our campaign that **he's agreed to personally match the first $50 of every donation** through the end of the month – up to maximum of $2500. See his note below. **[So, will you help me close out November by donating now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39036910/318115013/362153935?refcode=2021-11-24-wagnerfwd&recurring=0&amount=50&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=be9399db-f34e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTkzOTlkYi1mMzRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3dH7LrEjWerzbaynr_gYDgBSIroohtjo4k6EUKqus-E=)** Our campaign is growing by leaps and bounds – and I'm hoping you'll be one of our founding donors before the holiday weekend is over. Thank you! _Andrea_ Forwarded Message Did you hear? Oregon is getting a congressional sixth district—and it's right here in our area. The new district starts in Beaverton and picks up a few neighborhoods in Lake Oswego, Tigard, Tualatin, Sherwood, Wilsonville, and down 99W to McMinnville and Monmouth and down I-5 to Salem, plus all of Yamhill and Polk counties. It's a diverse district — over 20% Hispanic. In 162 years, Oregon has only elected five women and one person of color to the U.S. House of Representatives. Oregonians deserve leaders that represent all of our diverse communities. Far too often, political observers, funders, and institutions overlook leaders who look different than those who have traditionally wielded power. **Here's the great news: State Rep. Andrea Salinas has thrown her hat in the ring—and I couldn't be more excited.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39036911/318115014/362153935?refcode=2021-11-24-wagnerfwd&recurring=0&amount=50&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=be9399db-f34e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTkzOTlkYi1mMzRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3dH7LrEjWerzbaynr_gYDgBSIroohtjo4k6EUKqus-E=) Andrea is the daughter of an immigrant farmworker and would be the first Latina to serve Oregon in Congress. clean_body: | | | Well, this is exciting! State Senator Rob Wagner is so enthusiastic about our campaign that he's agreed to personally match the first $50 of every donation through the end of the month – up to maximum of $2500. See his note below. = Our campaign is growing by leaps and bounds – and I'm hoping you'll be one of our founding donors before the holiday weekend is over. Thank you! Andrea Forwarded Message Did you hear? Oregon is getting a congressional sixth district—and it's right here in our area. The new district starts in Beaverton and picks up a few neighborhoods in Lake Oswego, Tigard, Tualatin, Sherwood, Wilsonville, and down 99W to McMinnville and Monmouth and down I-5 to Salem, plus all of Yamhill and Polk counties. It's a diverse district — over 20% Hispanic. In 162 years, Oregon has only elected five women and one person of color to the U.S. House of Representatives. Oregonians deserve leaders that represent all of our diverse communities. Far too often, political observers, funders, and institutions overlook leaders who look different than those who have traditionally wielded power. Here's the great news: State Rep. Andrea Salinas has thrown her hat in the ring—and I couldn't be more excited. = Andrea is the daughter of an immigrant farmworker and would be the first Latina to serve Oregon in Congress. Andrea is a GREAT legislator and she is going to make an extraordinary representative in Congress. When you need to get something done in the Oregon House, folks know that you'd better get Andrea involved, because that's how change happens. = And here's how committed I am: I will personally match every donation of up to $50 per person to her campaign made before the end of November — up to a maximum of $2500. That's how important Andrea's campaign is to me. = In just under a year, you'll be able to smile and tell your friends and family that you were there at the beginning of this historic campaign. Let's make it happen! Rob Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andrea Salinas for Congress instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 0985 Tigard, OR 97223 United States Email is an important way for Andrea Salinas to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Healthcare costs, low wages, student debt, housing insecurity-- these are everyday stresses that are compounded by facing all of the social pressures of a holiday season focused on shopping. When I think about the families in my district struggling this holiday season, I think about the expanded Child Tax Credit first introduced in President Biden’s Covid Relief Bill. It needs to be extended in Build Back Better or it will expire. $300 a month has changed so many working class families’ lives. We cannot let Democrats sit on legislation that is so essential to families. **Our district needs Build Back Better — and it needs a champion who will fight to get it done.** **[Donate $7 to help elect a representative that will put pressure on Democrats in the Senate to pass Build Back Better Now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfhLxh3fueuXy5G-_7IprliVKrSu45lsUSLEiCp156l6kU5dv2b9NDyhLnnQbvPnd_GDOLyr345oDoxlsbv_sNo4h5o221y4cf_t3_iNicDyoM2Lq69SdsamLNmHTnQ6TcZk-lNmOBbW4XHEch_rZmSohLZKIfK8ZIUSXCpuTZfWdOdPNBmWOJNTkujV3kFAh2V9RwCYWJygE5-rgID-CG_vNwXvLWidGqh1MQ9kvKWNvFhPksoGqweYpksdV5dlhyu6aYgghAAMopP_IKsZZHjyoO7q68BUwmVYFsdyKopVU/3hc/Slrxcd47SZCe9iJKLCkHIA/h1/uAR55LSoHQ9A8uoETPItz-gzWYlbXjG3gRgguHqwGE4)** [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfhLxh3fueuXy5G-_7IprliYuLeWv7t_ZATDbQtjldy0eoQIm6LtjWYPewLybDwGGQ6hWMWRA5IYpvEUzzWHBZ3T3mcp9GER7n-6ZywoQZsIJ-rJjR2FaZWzT17lMHAv783Uk4rI-jzduigi-ui7wuhT74COatgxsPRp2Hd6-dvtTajWioNZHSDNHoK3BFivvwkd5l0iYv9ZrBBQkCvITAbc_UdzVBYuM9HUP50tvCwozOtI0vyx1p31o4KulsVXkhF-O3_r-5MvFZ_-x5M6tl9YMMfErqK2gEA8eHgQ-4Mws/3hc/Slrxcd47SZCe9iJKLCkHIA/h2/ihvbQmNkFvT-jHZH2txe0ZQFwCsvdcDyOepG6TZoHLk) The truth is, extending the Child Tax Credit is just the beginning of what working families need. name: Charles Booker
subject: Peter's official supporter record + updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Our team has been busy at work getting ready for the end of the year,
running numbers and setting goals. We’ll share more in just a moment — but
first, we wanted to share your supporter record with you:

Team Booker Supporter Record

Name:
Peter

Donor Status: $0
(This is the best moment to make your first donation and show your support
for Charles!)

Suggested Donation: Make a
$5 donation
to help us finish out the month strong.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13288?refcode=em20211126-1262&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1262%2E346206%2Ee0PTS2 ]DONATE NOW →

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13288?refcode=em20211126-1262&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1262%2E346206%2Ee0PTS2 ]After running the numbers and taking stock of what our campaign needs
in order to be best set up for success going into the election year —
we’ve set a goal to raise $20,220 over email by the end of the month. Will
you please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13288?refcode=em20211126-1262&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1262%2E346206%2Ee0PTS2 ]DONATE $5 NOW →

Right now, a lot of people are watching to see if we have the grassroots
support it’ll take to bring it home for Kentucky next year.

Growing a people powered campaign — especially one as big and critical as
ours — doesn’t happen overnight. It happens starting now, over time, and
with the continued support of a strong base.

That is why it’s so important we hit this fundraising goal out of the park
and build a movement that is ready to fight and bring real change to
Kentucky.

Peter, Rand
Paul and his team will be watching to see whether our movement has the
grassroots backing and widespread support to compete against his corporate
money and big-money donors.

The media and political pundits will be watching to see how many folks are
ready to fight to elect Charles and support an agenda centered on bold
solutions.

GOP leaders will be anxiously watching closely as well because they know
if Kentuckians vote in large numbers, Rand won’t stand a chance. So let’s
make sure we do,
Peter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13288?refcode=em20211126-1262&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1262%2E346206%2Ee0PTS2 ]Please donate $5 or anything you can to help us reach
our $20,220 goal today. It’s critical that we prove to everyone that our
grassroots movement is ready to fight to send Charles to the U.S. Senate —
and to make sure our campaign has the funds to start investing in critical
organizing and outreach efforts. Chip in now:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13288?refcode=em20211126-1262&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1262%2E346206%2Ee0PTS2 ]DONATE $5 NOW →

— Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211126-1262-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1262_346206_e0PTS2&akid=1262%2E346206%2Ee0PTS2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1262%2E346206%2Ee0PTS2

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

[ ]Please donate $5 or anything you can to help us reach our $20,220 goal today. It’s critical that we prove to everyone that our grassroots movement is ready to fight to send Charles to the U.S. Senate — and to make sure our campaign has the funds to start investing in critical organizing and outreach efforts. Chip in now: [ ]DONATE $5 NOW → — Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:
