name: Carole King
subject: a personal favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it's Carole King. I’m reaching out to you today because I care so deeply about our country.

While our Democratic senators are working night and day to bring positive change to struggling families this year, Mitch McConnell and his do-nothing Republican conference are scheming up new ways to regain control of the Senate in 2022.

**We cannot let Republicans regain the majority.**

They’re also using _old_ ways to regain control, raking in huge amounts of money from undisclosed deep-pocketed donors. And they’re OUTRAISING us by a lot!

But we can overcome their dark money. Last year, we were part of a massive grassroots movement, and we won. If we all stay engaged and pitch in with $5 or whatever we can afford, WE CAN WIN AGAIN!!

**[Can I count on you to stand with me in the fight to meet the DSCC’s critical end-of-month fundraising goal so we can hold and potentially expand our razor-thin Democratic majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)**

We’ve seen how a McConnell-controlled Senate spells COMPLETE AND UTTER DISASTER for the American people. While Senate Democrats are working night and day to lift us and our neighbors in the American community, Republicans won’t even lift a finger to help.

Think about what Democrats have accomplished so far:

* Delivered CRITICAL pandemic relief
* Passed a HISTORIC infrastructure bill
* Cut taxes for over 35 MILLION families
* Created millions of good-paying jobs
* Voted to ensure everyone’s sacred right to vote

Every Republican senator voted AGAINST the Freedom to Vote Act.

**What are they afraid of?**

If we lose the Senate... well, you saw the blatant misuse of raw power when Republicans were in charge. We are NOT going there, and I know we can win if we all pitch in.

**Your donation could make the difference between a Democratic Senate majority that’s dedicated to delivering what you and your family need—and Mitch McConnell, who will stop at nothing to become Majority Leader again.**

**[Please join me and other grassroots donors in this fight to make sure that Mitch never has the word “Majority” in his title again without the word “former” in front of it!](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)**
We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=7&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=8&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)
---
Over the years I’ve spent time with a lot of Democratic senators, and I want to assure you that Democrats really are dedicated to making the world a better place. Your support will mean so much to them and will allow them to keep fighting for you and your family.

Thank you so much for all _you_ do.

\- Carole
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority in 2022. And yes, Carole really did write this email.
| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211126-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2021-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2024_9716520_6hNMdu&akid=2024%2E9716520%2E6hNMdu)**.

body:
While a lot of people talk a big game, I know what it takes to put America FIRST and actually WIN for the conservative cause.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;

|
| | | | OFFICIAL GOP COMMUNICATION
---
| **\- From the Desk of Mike Pompeo -**
70th Secretary of State I wanted you to make sure you knew about our new organization - CAVPAC - which is focused on pushing back against the radical Left and doing everything in our power to Champion American Values.

When President Trump asked me to become his Secretary of State, I knew it would be an incredible opportunity to make a difference in the lives of so many Americans and to advance the conservative agenda. And that’s exactly what I did.

As a member of the Trump Administration, we secured the border, stood up to Iran, stopped China from stealing American jobs, and stood tall in defense of religious freedom. As President Trump’s top negotiator, I traveled the globe to make the world respect the United States again. We talked the talk and walked the walk.

Now, our nation stands at a crossroads. I have no intention to sit on the sidelines and let the Democrats ruin all the progress we made. It’s absolutely critical to the future of our great nation and the Republican Party that we double down our efforts to protect American values. **That’s why I’ve started a new organization with one mission: Champion American Values. **
---
**You’ve been identified as a top patriot and ally in our fight, so I’m extending you an EXCLUSIVE Founding Member opportunity.**

If you know me, you know I’m not one to back down in the face of attacks from the radical Left or the mainstream media. With the radical Left imposing their anti-police, pro-tax, big government, socialist agenda on the American people, it’s more important now than ever that we unite to elect conservatives who are willing to stand up for religious freedom, pro-life values, the Second Amendment, a stronger military and the America First agenda.

With CAVPAC, I’m dedicating as many resources as possible to electing principled conservatives all across the country who are willing to stand up to Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden. We must take back the House and Senate for Republicans, but I can’t do it alone._**Can I count on you to become a Founding Member in our fight?**_

name: Jessica Semachko, Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, November 26th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037414/318118607/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmE2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45GcOKEcBR5DXcNVx_hnne0q4L7INAuwvJaRpEtAb9g=)

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, November 26th, 2021**
Peter,
From walking with supporters in the annual Montgomery County Thanksgiving Parade, to passing out turkeys in Prince George’s County with Senator Joanne C. Benson, and participating in the Maryland Democratic Party’s Burger and Brews forum in Southern Maryland, Tom was honored to be able to continue meeting Marylanders and sharing his vision for our great state.
We hope you and your loved ones had a safe and blessed holiday. We are so grateful for your support for Tom Perez for Maryland and realize that #TeamTom would not be where we are without supporters like you. We look forward to keeping in touch as we continue to build our movement.
Best,
Jessica Semachko
Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland

* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037416/318118609/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmE2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45GcOKEcBR5DXcNVx_hnne0q4L7INAuwvJaRpEtAb9g=&emci=b5751c9f-6b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96a69ed2-fb4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
Tom kicked off his weekend at the annual Montgomery County Thanksgiving Parade where he was joined by supporters and friends from across the state. Thank you to our amazing members of #TeamTom who marched in Saturday's parade and helped to make the day such a success.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037418/318118611/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmE2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45GcOKEcBR5DXcNVx_hnne0q4L7INAuwvJaRpEtAb9g=&emci=b5751c9f-6b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96a69ed2-fb4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
Tom was honored to join Senator Joanne C. Benson and dozens of volunteers Monday to distribute over 600 Thanksgiving meals to those in need in Prince George's County. Senator Benson is a tireless leader in Prince George’s County who has made a lifelong commitment to serving others, and we are so blessed to have her on our team.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037423/318118613/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmE2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45GcOKEcBR5DXcNVx_hnne0q4L7INAuwvJaRpEtAb9g=&emci=b5751c9f-6b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96a69ed2-fb4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
It was also an excellent opportunity for Tom to connect with the friends and neighbors dedicating their time to support their community, including student-athletes from Bishop McNamara High School in Forestville.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037425/318118619/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmE2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45GcOKEcBR5DXcNVx_hnne0q4L7INAuwvJaRpEtAb9g=&emci=b5751c9f-6b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96a69ed2-fb4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)
Later that day, Tom headed down to Charles County in Southern Maryland to participate in the Maryland Democratic Party’s first “Burgers and Brews” forum of this campaign season. The next Governor of Maryland needs to make sure that every single person has opportunity in this state. That has been Tom's life’s work, and he is committed to continuing that as Governor. Thank you to Chairwoman Yvette Lewis as well as the Maryland Democratic Party staff for putting together a successful forum! You can catch a replay [_**here**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037428/318118621/-959832697?acontext=%7B%22ref%22%3A%2252%22%2C%22action_history%22%3A%22%5B%7B%5C%22surface%5C%22%3A%5C%22share_link%5C%22%2C%5C%22mechanism%5C%22%3A%5C%22share_link%5C%22%2C%5C%22extra_data%5C%22%3A%7B%5C%22invite_link_id%5C%22%3A489497242259961%7D%7D%5D%22%7D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmE2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45GcOKEcBR5DXcNVx_hnne0q4L7INAuwvJaRpEtAb9g=&emci=b5751c9f-6b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96a69ed2-fb4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837).
* * *
**In the News**
# **[Kathleen Matthews Backing Perez for Governor in 2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037431/318118624/-1004308501?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmE2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45GcOKEcBR5DXcNVx_hnne0q4L7INAuwvJaRpEtAb9g=&emci=b5751c9f-6b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96a69ed2-fb4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**
_“I have several good friends and political allies in the 2022 Maryland gubernatorial race, and would be pleased to have any one of them as our Democratic nominee and future governor,” she wrote. “I had originally planned to sit on the fence until after the primary, but have decided Tom is the best prepared and energized to move Maryland forward after the COVID crisis, and I am committed to helping him win the nomination.”_
**[Jobs, economy in view during gubernatorial forum](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037436/318118627/313203238?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmE2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45GcOKEcBR5DXcNVx_hnne0q4L7INAuwvJaRpEtAb9g=&emci=b5751c9f-6b4d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96a69ed2-fb4e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14684837)**
_““Income inequality in the 20th century was at its lowest when union density was at its highest,” Tom Perez, former secretary of labor under Obama, said. Perez said that shared prosperity could be achievable if businesses and workers came together.”_
* * *

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. = Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, November 26th, 2021 Peter, From walking with supporters in the annual Montgomery County Thanksgiving Parade, to passing out turkeys in Prince George’s County with Senator Joanne C. Benson, and participating in the Maryland Democratic Party’s Burger and Brews forum in Southern Maryland, Tom was honored to be able to continue meeting Marylanders and sharing his vision for our great state. We hope you and your loved ones had a safe and blessed holiday. We are so grateful for your support for Tom Perez for Maryland and realize that #TeamTom would not be where we are without supporters like you. We look forward to keeping in touch as we continue to build our movement. Best, Jessica Semachko Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail Tom kicked off his weekend at the annual Montgomery County Thanksgiving Parade where he was joined by supporters and friends from across the state. Thank you to our amazing members of #TeamTom who marched in Saturday's parade and helped to make the day such a success. Tom was honored to join Senator Joanne C. Benson and dozens of volunteers Monday to distribute over 600 Thanksgiving meals to those in need in Prince George's County. Senator Benson is a tireless leader in Prince George’s County who has made a lifelong commitment to serving others, and we are so blessed to have her on our team. It was also an excellent opportunity for Tom to connect with the friends and neighbors dedicating their time to support their community, including student-athletes from Bishop McNamara High School in Forestville. Later that day, Tom headed down to Charles County in Southern Maryland to participate in the Maryland Democratic Party’s first “Burgers and Brews” forum of this campaign season. The next Governor of Maryland needs to make sure that every single person has opportunity in this state. That has been Tom's life’s work, and he is committed to continuing that as Governor. Thank you to Chairwoman Yvette Lewis as well as the Maryland Democratic Party staff for putting together a successful forum! You can catch a replay . In the News “I have several good friends and political allies in the 2022 Maryland gubernatorial race, and would be pleased to have any one of them as our Democratic nominee and future governor,” she wrote. “I had originally planned to sit on the fence until after the primary, but have decided Tom is the best prepared and energized to move Maryland forward after the COVID crisis, and I am committed to helping him win the nomination.” ““Income inequality in the 20th century was at its lowest when union density was at its highest,” Tom Perez, former secretary of labor under Obama, said. Perez said that shared prosperity could be achievable if businesses and workers came together.” ICYMI Our webstore is now live! Visit to let everyone know you're on . Team Tom Schedule of Upcoming Events Tuesday, November 30 | 5:30 PM Rockville, MD Hosted by Elliott Andalman, Chuck Fax, Jason Gould, Mary Ellen Flynn, Tim Maloney, Corrine Parver, Sidney Schupak Thursday, December 2 | 6:30 PM The Home of Sally Scott and Jimmy Potash Baltimore, MD Hosted by Arnie Richman, Chickie Grayson, Mike Ashford & Wendy Bolger, Beth Harber & Henry Kay, Martha Holleman & Jim French, Susan Leviton, Sally Scott & Jimmy Potash, and Ellen & Jeff Spokes Wednesday, December 8 | 6:00 PM The Home of Jim Lyons Annapolis, MD Hosted by Jim Lyons, Warren Hamel, John Griffin, and Fred & Eileen Hoover Saturday, December 11 | 5:00 PM The Home of Kathleen Matthews Chevy Chase, MD Hosted by Ambassador Elizabeth Frawley Bagley & Kathleen Matthews Saturday, December 18 | 5:00 PM Montgomery County, MD Hosted by Ambassador Osman Siddique and Anis Ahmed Saturday, January 8 | 2:00 PM The Home of Shu-Ping Chan Bethesda, MD Hosted by Shu-Ping Chan Tuesday, January 11 | 5:30 PM The Home of Aris Mardirossian Potomac, MD Hosted by Aris Mardirossian Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I’m personally reaching out

body:
#

Friend,
In **four** short days, our November fundraising deadline expires, so I’m personally reaching out to see if you can help us hit our crucial $10,000 fundraising goal.
The support from our grassroots movement made a huge impact in last year’s election — and your contributions propelled our campaign to victory.
I have championed transformational policies since taking office in January — and just this month alone, I fought tooth and nail to get both the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ and the _Build Back Better Act_ passed.
Thanks to Democratic leadership, our country is making critical investments in both the American people and our physical infrastructure — while creating millions of good-paying jobs, expanding access to high-quality child care and early learning programs, making health care affordable for millions more, repairing our roads and bridges, addressing the climate crisis, and so many other life-changing programs and policies.
While my Democratic colleagues and I are fighting on behalf of the American people, the GOP is working around the clock to undermine our efforts to deliver on President Biden’s broadly popular agenda and take away our reproductive and voting rights.
To protect the future of our democracy, we need to marshal our resources to defend our majority and ensure Republicans don’t take back control of Congress.
**[Before our fundraising deadline expires on Tuesday, will you send a contribution of $5 or more to support my re-election campaign? Friend, I’m counting on your support before Tuesday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037481/318118679/-1116019946?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2E2OWVkMi1mYjRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mHTqE10SkWZO_DXCMF3qF0GY9z7VFVq2jNrWoObqa4o=)**

clean_body: Friend, In four short days, our November fundraising deadline expires, so I’m personally reaching out to see if you can help us hit our crucial $10,000 fundraising goal. The support from our grassroots movement made a huge impact in last year’s election — and your contributions propelled our campaign to victory. I have championed transformational policies since taking office in January — and just this month alone, I fought tooth and nail to get both the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act and the Build Back Better Act passed. Thanks to Democratic leadership, our country is making critical investments in both the American people and our physical infrastructure — while creating millions of good-paying jobs, expanding access to high-quality child care and early learning programs, making health care affordable for millions more, repairing our roads and bridges, addressing the climate crisis, and so many other life-changing programs and policies. While my Democratic colleagues and I are fighting on behalf of the American people, the GOP is working around the clock to undermine our efforts to deliver on President Biden’s broadly popular agenda and take away our reproductive and voting rights. To protect the future of our democracy, we need to marshal our resources to defend our majority and ensure Republicans don’t take back control of Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Thank you for standing with me. If we lay the groundwork now, we can continue building the future that we all deserve. Onwards, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: A Message From James Carville
subject: Why we need Val Demings:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multi-million-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037774/318119726/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1781-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzIyMGU4NS1mYzRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wMA_oW9_8LX33nV01UqWkTElIouSk-s4zs-UpwVbbRM=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**

clean_body: | | | Listen up, friend! Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way. So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes). That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. Especially when up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multi-million-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $55,000 before her midnight deadline tonight, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: = From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it. Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39037986/318120686/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTE4NzVlYS1mZDRlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eok5ZhmE-HbvVYSUMbxCzOBbQOLjVPRj_8E0VXaNum0=)
Team, I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving with those closest to you, and took a moment to be grateful for all we have this year. One thing I’m most thankful for is this team, and the support you’ve shown me over the years. Because of you, Democrats have achieved so much for working families. Of course, there is still more work to be done, but the latest round of Child Tax Credit payments hitting bank accounts last week meant families were more able to put food on the table this Thanksgiving, and some parents may have been able to skip their overtime shift to spend more time with their families. That’s progress. Stories like these mean our work is making a meaningful difference in the lives of people across the country. And that’s only possible because of the support I receive from this grassroots team. Our average online gift this month was $22.86, which shows this campaign is powered by folks chipping in just $5, $15, or $30 bucks at a time. I don’t take money from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because _**you**_ power this campaign. Our average donation shows that. **I wouldn’t bother you during the holidays if it wasn’t important. We’re just days away from our end-of-month deadline, and fundraising is slower as folks spend time offline for Thanksgiving. MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Fundraising, the holidays, and you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We hope you were able to take some time to be with friends and family this
week, Peter. We just wanted to
make sure you saw this message from our Executive Director, Alexandra
Rojas.

We’re so grateful for everything you’ve helped us accomplish this year,
and for things that we’ll do together in 2022 and beyond. But before you
start your weekend, Team JD has one small request.

Fundraising tends to take a significant downturn around the holidays.
Unfortunately for us, it’s right before our end-of-month fundraising
deadline AND less than 90 days before early voting starts in our first
2022 primary. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84534?refcode=em20211126-20681&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=20681%2E1203867%2Eh7NcIM ]We really can’t afford to fall short – so do you think
you could chip in $5, $10, or whatever amount you can right now to help us
meet our $30,000 November end-of-month goal?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84534?refcode=em20211126-20681&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20681%2E1203867%2Eh7NcIM ]Contribute

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
Date: Wednesday, Nov 24, 2021 at 10:30 AM
Subject: Quick Thanks

Peter,

I wanted to reach out before Thanksgiving and, well, say thanks. I’m
grateful that we’ve had your support this year. Here’s just some of what
you helped us accomplish:

Five campaign launches for progressive primary challengers. Without you,
we couldn’t have had such incredible launches for Odessa Kelly, Rana
Abdelhamid, Kina Collins, Jessica Cisneros, and Summer Lee. With your
help, our primary campaigns have gotten off to fast fundraising starts and
made national headlines.

Jessica is less than 90 days from early voting. We’ve asked folks to chip
into her campaign several times, so she can build the momentum and voter
contact operation right now to win, and our supporters have come through.
We can win this race together.

We’ve shown our strength when corporate Democrats try to stop
progressives. Justice Democrats in Congress ensured progressive priorities
like climate action and universal pre-K remained in the Build Back Better
Act in the House. And when centrists try to blame progressives for
corporate Democrats losing elections, we stand up and counter the
mainstream scapegoat narrative.

So, thank you, Peter.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84534?refcode=em20211126-20681&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=20681%2E1203867%2Eh7NcIM ]Our momentum is growing but it will take a mountain of continued
support to win our primaries and build the progressive movement. Can you
chip in $3 today so we can continue our work together?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84534?refcode=em20211126-20681&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=20681%2E1203867%2Eh7NcIM ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1006&akid=20681%2E1203867%2Eh7NcIM ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1007&akid=20681%2E1203867%2Eh7NcIM ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211126-20681-footer&t=1008&refcode2=20681_1203867_h7NcIM&akid=20681%2E1203867%2Eh7NcIM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=20681%2E1203867%2Eh7NcIM

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: We have work to do, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39038740/318124304/1561815853?refcode=ea.af5e5899-054f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.af5e5899-054f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjVlNTg5OS0wNTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X5KNpPflSNP715ZaKMGQLUW4ugngNOOSuSk2-0jfdf8=&emci=81417ac9-a14c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=af5e5899-054f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)
---
| | Peter —

I hope you and your loved ones had a healthy and safe Thanksgiving. It’s such a wonderful opportunity to pause our busy lives and reflect on what we are grateful for.

I also don’t want this weekend to pass without acknowledging the painful legacy of colonization in our country and the important contributions of Indigenous Americans to our state and our country.

So today, join me in celebrating the strength and resilience of the First Americans.

We must recognize the immense contributions of our Indigenous neighbors in Colorado and across the country. We have work to do to better honor our Indigenous neighbors and uphold the treaties and promises we made to them, and build a future where all cultures thrive. I look forward to doing that work together.

Sincerely,

Dr. Yadira Caraveo
---
| PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
---

PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614

subject: Buckle up. This is going to get rough.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
We refuse to back down. | Friend, Matt is asking if you’ve seen this damning MSNBC news report yet: | **MSNBC: _“GOP redistricting maps will gerrymander Democrats out of the House”_**
---
Republicans are close to securing the House majority in 2022 based on gerrymandered maps alone. And they want to make their grip on power permanent — whether or not the people want it.
**_[There’s no way Matt is backing down from this fight. We’re counting on 1,000 grassroots fighters to chip in $25 or more before the end of the month to help beat the GOP>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39038742/318124388/-494759576?refcode=em_MW_FR_EOM1_112621_l1&amount=25&refcode2=347c874b-064f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDdjODc0Yi0wNjRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EW4fAd45ZVqTLyc2X7VGQO5VwQtGioRPlpTSSM0U74o=)_**

name: James Tarantin
subject: Jerusalem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. |
---

Hey Peter,

I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world.

**Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision.**

I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. **_END OF STORY._**

[** DO YOU AGREE WITH THE DECISION OF OUR 45TH PRESIDENT? **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4c9c0b80f3524fffa45014fe564e3c29&_e=TV8X1H0ZZ-0piorxbsvHqq8TFbW2nMEKX4MSsteSkBUQiQbDvjUKmKy67QsCWgnwJU5JzXi0CDq27nsYdyBoJBuIRBz9SrOWytLfrPUpJC7Nprkrsd7bC6lklv7i2QbT0Hom1SlMniHHZByhzvzae2d2x1ZPjo-rOP2mFWl7ckW2Iwr7VyE27lFbhq4h7r2_urHKwydjwZL1G6l-OXqVxvB13RNJ28uACDVKuyQqQrLpljAfuihWwUSI4POF7v7jaZ6NA1KqI3ep_RpCGbyBZimL4Dy9FdI3Fn9-3KycvPWoVSIMpCzyoJC2dQFO8hd1Wh1J0sNGhaNXWxdjjxJGKJC39syKo-C54pCc4TDamKI8PGi-toUxDJbvRJSmY2HOw-Sg77j9yy9XDSXmIdJwItn6G2K_-5mTtvDBk8XPh5jHsN06ff_yf4W__v1MQJ4DfIA_Wx15LbPUoBKlAPQQ6C04QeVS-XQdHTswsLrxM2Jf2zyhsPMai3F9yIRszcJV)
The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel.

Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. [**Don’t you agree Peter?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4c9c0b80f3524fffa45014fe564e3c29&_e=TV8X1H0ZZ-0piorxbsvHqq8TFbW2nMEKX4MSsteSkBUQiQbDvjUKmKy67QsCWgnwJU5JzXi0CDq27nsYdyBoJBuIRBz9SrOWytLfrPUpJC7Nprkrsd7bC6lklv7i2QbT0Hom1SlMniHHZByhzvzae2d2x1ZPjo-rOP2mFWl7ckW2Iwr7VyE27lFbhq4h7r2_urHKwydjwZL1G6l-OXqVxvB13RNJ28uACDVKuyQqQrLpljAfuihWwUSI4POF7v7jaZ6NA1KqI3ep_RpCGbyBZimL4Dy9FdI3Fn9-3KycvPUpuuh9mFM1FxL1tvftl7FIaTIdc2HG5jQ37bhG8DSdBr7tXCfxTP3ieREb3GbUY_647VrIJBZRLh7cW4rjZlEwGqNbQAO6cCtEZHfG8RPDcZluClJcsMwlnGiN8R0hfElp5vIHHGvhxyIXdezeVXnVK1pNFS0VNLcMsW-VvMPMjgWftetBU6jsJmWpZICGMfbPKzLhoP2ABO0upFMxDV1H)

**I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**If you agree with me then please help me become the next Republican Senator from Maryland, and let’s finally win back to the America we know and love.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4c9c0b80f3524fffa45014fe564e3c29&_e=TV8X1H0ZZ-0piorxbsvHqq8TFbW2nMEKX4MSsteSkBUQiQbDvjUKmKy67QsCWgnwJU5JzXi0CDq27nsYdyBoJBuIRBz9SrOWytLfrPUpJC7Nprkrsd7bC6lklv7i2QbT0Hom1SlMniHHZByhzvzae2d2x1ZPjo-rOP2mFWl7ckW2Iwr7VyE27lFbhq4h7r2_urHKwydjwZL1G6l-OXqVxvB13RNJ28uACDVKuyQqQrLpljAfuihWwUSI4POF7v7jaZ6NA1KqI3ep_RpCGbyBZimL4Dy9FdI3Fn9-3KycvPWqLQJbWMDtubiwcUQbKdQQupQAEBC1d2O27p8oNB4Vag71gBFv5m_IgXrJyA7DklZj0ylVWEGR5GOuV8NAm8dKnVQKwpDGDb7ySEgmzfK2oOGuv1TlVrCUwdq3eVgr-PIy8vWA-PPSQrJmMLZDXalszvQSxQzD3N_OIpDyFUIUkypGzIPVdYjUxoPLlDwUfOGS0UuYJEcRxnpM2U0Rlc72)

Thank you,

**James Tarantin for U.S. Senate**

name: Great America Update
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6510%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gQj%2f64la9kulr6xdK4KDFQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67202%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BUDqN8dTOVIQLpE99XxtbQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle--the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”--embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice--that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted--liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope--we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. ** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67203%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IcGE9B1yu%2bG1vCLKN5XdoQ&sysid=1)**_ [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67204%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XezU1bJRhyNjNlAuvCKGYw&sysid=1) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty--which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources--and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** --but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more? ** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67203%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IcGE9B1yu%2bG1vCLKN5XdoQ&sysid=1)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67203%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IcGE9B1yu%2bG1vCLKN5XdoQ&sysid=1)**_
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6510%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gQj%2f64la9kulr6xdK4KDFQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6510%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gQj%2f64la9kulr6xdK4KDFQ&sysid=1)

Trust me, this time of year around the holidays is the *single* busiest time of year for holiday deliveries, especially this year.
**So when I say that you gotta place your orders in the Fetterman online store now for holiday delivery TODAY, I mean it!!!**

Seventeen House Democrats are either retiring or running for another office next year. That is because they know they are going to lose the House to Republicans like Colin who are now surging in the polls.

The National Republican Congressional Committee needs all hands on deck to unseat Maloney and other Democrats who have failed the people they represent. Inflation is out of control, crime is on the rise, and the Democrats remain out of touch with Middle-Class Americans .

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. Tho
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcsi320t7od3rindrts9elqb8m3t7t1n3d7u7o98_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjhmao74chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgvk8ckad31k57nf7ne5511fn2ruqedntatl1dp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjhmao74chh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zakl2325gaaidni1s7ob0u9k09vgf48jlt4tgnt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjhmao74chh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2za9l1o98kdp5cpgep03efffsvsi7u06suf2huu2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cjhmao74chh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: Democratic Senate Update
subject: Latest data out of Iowa:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Data report out of Iowa for Peter:
* Democrat Abby Finkenauer, the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue, officially outraised her opponent, seven-term incumbent Sen. Chuck Grassley (R), in the third fundraising quarter of the year.

* More bad news for Sen. Grassley: A new poll from The Des Moines Register shows he has his highest _disapproval_ with Iowa voters in decades.

* With Senate control split 50-50, a win in Iowa could virtually guarantee Democrats Senate control. But the Senate GOP campaign arm has raised $76 million this year to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley.

* Abby Finkenauer will need another historic fundraising quarter to secure the resources to compete against Mitch McConnell and Sen. Grassley.

**Grassroots supporters who care about defeating Sen. Chuck Grassley and protecting the Democratic Senate majority can make a donation to Abby's campaign using this link: ****[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39039302/318127223/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk424-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTgwOWQ0OC0wZDRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPCZf1Yr2wrhlsm0Yrx2neRf_GWzT6nooW_t-3sdrAg=)**

Chuck Grassley (R), in the third fundraising quarter of the year. More bad news for Sen. Grassley: A new poll from The Des Moines Register shows he has his highest disapproval with Iowa voters in decades. With Senate control split 50-50, a win in Iowa could virtually guarantee Democrats Senate control. But the Senate GOP campaign arm has raised $76 million this year to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley. Abby Finkenauer will need another historic fundraising quarter to secure the resources to compete against Mitch McConnell and Sen. Grassley. Grassroots supporters who care about defeating Sen. subject: Our Embassy in Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. |
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0a50eb323f2146a1bf08d8fa192ed91c&_e=v0CDMIRkqJ8tSGkBACz5dRlfLbZh33tVDAEQ_b4GuRSbMQxoG0aOdwDWUPpuf5d5tP9rxOJLq6s2feI0Nr3fHvleSKEQla_HSff1g_QMvh1Da-TU9LGTN7I74t0SrBJHUC1BYYco68k6E7qNB-wR6ZGz0oPqFtE90fos1ckAHkzTdHyhuIg-Lqjmpzx9zOQ_coysuRUcZRmVsjiBXNIXBteT1ZQHqobzZZpBaKzai_0c3s2W2Spy_oqTwLsS6mJ7ZlsNgVErApp9KJBLfguOxG3ZIBtOolKnyuTbAWeJTeZhzLJD1n5RNUX6GMRrD-lW56-MHg-DO9qbSu-8P5X0pchyDc7WmFNT3S8wglg0MB9x5PXIPTmjIfHA8fPT2vyzbydqIYxyS2Gq9O3m7OToCQj1AGATnJtb5CK4icjxRRK1l9-aqPsMPJnOCHUPifT_EVG-e5BDvmWReleJBMj3hb8ZdwtWur-Y44mWedsaAS1H0BrE1YyO-lwqKe-NcwSM)

Hey Peter,

I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world.

**Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision.**

I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. **_END OF STORY._**

[** DO YOU AGREE WITH THE DECISION OF OUR 45TH PRESIDENT? **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0a50eb323f2146a1bf08d8fa192ed91c&_e=v0CDMIRkqJ8tSGkBACz5dRlfLbZh33tVDAEQ_b4GuRSbMQxoG0aOdwDWUPpuf5d5tP9rxOJLq6s2feI0Nr3fHvleSKEQla_HSff1g_QMvh1Da-TU9LGTN7I74t0SrBJHUC1BYYco68k6E7qNB-wR6ZGz0oPqFtE90fos1ckAHkzTdHyhuIg-Lqjmpzx9zOQ_coysuRUcZRmVsjiBXNIXBteT1ZQHqobzZZpBaKzai_0c3s2W2Spy_oqTwLsS6mJ7ZlsNgVErApp9KJBLfguOxG4nlSYeHmH0y4URKY5P7TvnbcSkMkceN1WeVkT6IpnCwKmBjBB_zxREH8Umaz678Oiw0slbpiNr02ejKIzJojwJ_LPYuBBkrfk-mtX9LSvJqZtG6gOZBiZS62OmrC4MT05DQWGAACJqovbX7E8cIHp-QClTD3IzKPbeIrBg84F-19OVTsTuNAk0V9qpP7Mb5_RSuGzx3z_asj4bSZk4rPT-wIfys2Smmw0n_l3hO-jx)
The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel.

Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. [**Don’t you agree Peter?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0a50eb323f2146a1bf08d8fa192ed91c&_e=v0CDMIRkqJ8tSGkBACz5dRlfLbZh33tVDAEQ_b4GuRSbMQxoG0aOdwDWUPpuf5d5tP9rxOJLq6s2feI0Nr3fHvleSKEQla_HSff1g_QMvh1Da-TU9LGTN7I74t0SrBJHUC1BYYco68k6E7qNB-wR6ZGz0oPqFtE90fos1ckAHkzTdHyhuIg-Lqjmpzx9zOQ_coysuRUcZRmVsjiBXNIXBteT1ZQHqobzZZpBaKzai_0c3s2W2Spy_oqTwLsS6mJ7ZlsNgVErApp9KJBLfguOxCCwGSOB-iu7bBGi3PFynSwMI4EszNYqRQj_ek_R34-ai1kLjBbhXpEywm-iNfXn_Yyecwl9ACL418h2nyMbXOukeMJSWEbgqBxEB-oU5-TheSJzssV33OTKqMSgXbGSxN2-VgziN7N7j4kLHdYiO-TDqfNHk1J-OzQSYky4N8UEF6Yp2lQmciVj7XtplafvjzidpMlBhe9qW77NokEW5VTIcAyve6lFWzDzRFtCuAnH)

**I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**If you agree with me then please help me become the next Republican Senator from Maryland, and let’s finally win back to the America we know and love.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0a50eb323f2146a1bf08d8fa192ed91c&_e=v0CDMIRkqJ8tSGkBACz5dRlfLbZh33tVDAEQ_b4GuRSbMQxoG0aOdwDWUPpuf5d5tP9rxOJLq6s2feI0Nr3fHvleSKEQla_HSff1g_QMvh1Da-TU9LGTN7I74t0SrBJHUC1BYYco68k6E7qNB-wR6ZGz0oPqFtE90fos1ckAHkzTdHyhuIg-Lqjmpzx9zOQ_coysuRUcZRmVsjiBXNIXBteT1ZQHqobzZZpBaKzai_0c3s2W2Spy_oqTwLsS6mJ7ZlsNgVErApp9KJBLfguOxDvkaDXh7QP5lZkOW1ABuqP2ezihVXblqtW706DFU9lVaapIjJhz-Lbp9kAeB7zjzxhKB1NghEQo8orsivstRo1u5Y2rtqPAa8u30UUvMVwsFOp1_hcOkJ_ByYo3NKOxNSLvcvDSTFzOGy57ZEY3XzsHfww7O-V6uLBgK-TBg5tlCxhHPguJlazjHo2SWZlauTiJ_RXKg-UkxzaWSJc-qe9YUer8oFE50cMrXclZC6YW)

Thank you,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0a50eb323f2146a1bf08d8fa192ed91c&_e=v0CDMIRkqJ8tSGkBACz5dRlfLbZh33tVDAEQ_b4GuRSbMQxoG0aOdwDWUPpuf5d5tP9rxOJLq6s2feI0Nr3fHvleSKEQla_HSff1g_QMvh1Da-TU9LGTN7I74t0SrBJHUC1BYYco68k6E7qNB-wR6ZGz0oPqFtE90fos1ckAHkzTdHyhuIg-Lqjmpzx9zOQ_coysuRUcZRmVsjiBXNIXBteT1ZQHqobzZZpBaKzai_0c3s2W2Spy_oqTwLsS6mJ7ZlsNgVErApp9KJBLfguOxFLF2lL850ZvjbvpGSqc2xWzNeRtvVC65l3jUEDi0CPA6xOLbh_OWXhDF-s9HtDOTF-peBSNwZUWnzaRugh12iLDd7gE_8Fp2mhDytkOCqjekfk44WZuxbjw2_0W86DJHR58-UwQ8VOB5Vd6WoPYUPzzlXHuR9lFlm7xSbJxnvhgPDVzEZz9ACwgeqS703tHyMR5xPWxHYtBp5e99ZIdCHXBbl5pNE18B6VsX1nfcmde)
**James Tarantin for U.S. Senate**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN FOR SENATE **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=0a50eb323f2146a1bf08d8fa192ed91c&_e=v0CDMIRkqJ8tSGkBACz5dRlfLbZh33tVDAEQ_b4GuRSbMQxoG0aOdwDWUPpuf5d5tP9rxOJLq6s2feI0Nr3fHvleSKEQla_HSff1g_QMvh1Da-TU9LGTN7I74t0SrBJHUC1BYYco68k6E7qNB-wR6ZGz0oPqFtE90fos1ckAHkzTdHyhuIg-Lqjmpzx9zOQ_coysuRUcZRmVsjiBXNIXBteT1ZQHqobzZZpBaKzai_0c3s2W2Spy_oqTwLsS6mJ7ZlsNgVErApp9KJBLfguOxEw_goHaUm4WrWQf0shzzHMB6V7TRxbGXTRzEysCROyNsJU7dHpbnXgReRl7nxx04Cbm7b5g-I0vxItsPsqM2GfzL5IhCWnh2CtV-fl1C8MgCEYN_T2ECIhTywreKXieNaUGh6_L4Trx9_F6RHFoOWrXErIM-PUEv7yYNwmLPEsLcM-83Wbf3DBNr-UoicRC63gPQ8Gb2jaKdeJ-L3XLPvijP_ktjy3XaJ8tZmuWzKOh)

body:

# The last two years have given me a lot to be thankful for -- and I owe it all to the unwavering support of people like you, friend.
---
| |
---
| | | [**Contribute to our campaign for honesty, integrity, and American values**](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=YcgjzG8v4G5XOuQchYKasO62ewBRHLZoM6eCMU2afy8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnVtZXJvLmFpL2NvbnRyaWJ1dGUvUmViZWthaC1Kb25lcy1Db25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiJkMzNhZmU2Ny0zM2NmLTQ3ZWMtYmFmZC0zYzNkMzdmZDdhNjciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ)

| | My family and I were blessed enough to survive COVID-19, even though the virus [nearly claimed](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=DM_BUt1C2RwhQAo1S0Rj5H19Osfy_buUk5QXg1Gb0Y8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3Bvc3QvcHVibGljLWhlYWx0aC1vZmZpY2lhbHMtcGxlYS1wbGVhc2UtZ2V0LXZhY2NpbmF0ZWQtYmVmb3JlLWl0LXMtdG9vLWxhdGUiLCJyIjoiYzBjNTJiOGEtNDM3YS00OTY1LWE4ZDAtODhlYmY3NTFmNTM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) two of my close family members' lives. My children are now safe from political persecution, I'm a free woman who won [a major victory](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=ZOKAhw7t_soxSZb6mx1LIy4HAQ9Uaue8ei4izf0jBkA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWlhbWloZXJhbGQuY29tL29waW5pb24vZWRpdG9yaWFscy9hcnRpY2xlMjUxNzgxMjczLmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiYzBjNTJiOGEtNDM3YS00OTY1LWE4ZDAtODhlYmY3NTFmNTM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) against the state, and [my campaign is proof](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=U8WuiFCm5I6rB1UgRZbxkqY6JGKRBToAezcYPi4q5rU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mbG9yaWRhcG9saXRpY3MuY29tL2FyY2hpdmVzLzQ3MTc2OS1wb2xsLXNob3dzLXJlYmVrYWgtam9uZXMtd2l0aGluLXN0cmlraW5nLWRpc3RhbmNlLW9mLW1hdHQtZ2FldHovIiwiciI6ImMwYzUyYjhhLTQzN2EtNDk2NS1hOGQwLTg4ZWJmNzUxZjUzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9) to the world that good, honest people can and will be elected against those who seek to destroy and undermine our democratic values. Thank you to everyone for your support this past year. \------------------------------------------------------------------------- How you can help us this holiday season: 1\. Complete and send us a[ ballot petition](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=2WjeCFD3ensDRIHvFrDc4vncYvX0dVxhNMLlajtbQGg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly8yNzdlM2E5OC02MDAzLTRmZGUtYjI0MS1jZWU2Njg0ZDBmZWEuZmlsZXN1c3IuY29tL3VnZC80N2IzNzlfNjc4NDQ2YTkzNGEzNGI4Yzg2ZDliMTVlNmYyYzk1YTIucGRmP2luZGV4PXRydWUiLCJyIjoiYzBjNTJiOGEtNDM3YS00OTY1LWE4ZDAtODhlYmY3NTFmNTM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) (Florida registered voters only). Those who help us collect 20 petitions or more anywhere in Florida can order a FREE t-shirt, buttons or yard sign! Email us for more details! 2\. Donate to our campaign (through [our website](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=_GiFW8oBv8dcgX0C40jTpMFXDR3CN5U89o1RjgSKqD0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnVtZXJvLmFpL2NvbnRyaWJ1dGUvUmViZWthaC1Kb25lcy1Db25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiJjMGM1MmI4YS00MzdhLTQ5NjUtYThkMC04OGViZjc1MWY1MzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ), [ActBlue](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=IOzsaGXCxk0sP61QlaFA74WwL0caDBMtw-Sk2RXVp7g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JlYmVrYWhqb25lc2NhbXBhaWduIiwiciI6ImMwYzUyYjhhLTQzN2EtNDk2NS1hOGQwLTg4ZWJmNzUxZjUzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9), or through [our merchandise store](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=Ol5c2l1EUeLoGVnlg5zLEDB55bPdYVLSRBv471MJxEc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JlYmVrYWhqb25lc3N0b3JlIiwiciI6ImMwYzUyYjhhLTQzN2EtNDk2NS1hOGQwLTg4ZWJmNzUxZjUzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)) 3\. Follow us on [Facebook](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=w6TIV9b_zthqh82tS8OHTfGMfmyccCrPm_x2gGPym8E.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL1JlYmVrYWhKb25lc0ZvckNvbmdyZXNzLyIsInIiOiJjMGM1MmI4YS00MzdhLTQ5NjUtYThkMC04OGViZjc1MWY1MzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI3ZTdhODdlMS03MDQzLTQxNzktYjgzOC01Y2E4OTIwZmFhZDcifQ) and [Instagram](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/fbNrTQJmb/c?w=36CrsbWbm-5uGpSQ-fmZ8Kj7V_SMK0Ty_sFPKdkaSLg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9yZWJla2Foam9uZXM0Y29uZ3Jlc3MvIiwiciI6ImMwYzUyYjhhLTQzN2EtNDk2NS1hOGQwLTg4ZWJmNzUxZjUzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9). name: Cynthia Cano, Beto for Texas
subject: We reviewed your information
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Our campaign — everything we do and will do in Texas — is funded by grassroots donors like you.
#
Hey, does this look right to you?
We looked back at your record* as a supporter of Beto, and here’s what we found:
_*This data only reflects donations made online. If you’ve made a previous contribution via check, you may not see it below — but know that Beto and our entire team are deeply grateful for your support._
**Supporter Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Supporter ID:** 444211 **Past donations:** **Not yet!********Suggested contribution:** $3
---
Contributions to emails like these lay the groundwork for our entire campaign. Supporters like you will determine the size of our campaign staff, the reach of our organizing programs, and ultimately, whether we’ll be powerful enough to win this election.
[If you can give now, it will make a big difference to our campaign. Will you consider making your suggested contribution — or any amount that feels right — today? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50257?refcode=ema20211126-164269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=164269%2E444211%2EnzvF5P)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50257?refcode=ema20211126-164269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=164269%2E444211%2EnzvF5P)**
We don’t accept contributions from corporate PACs, and Beto’s priority on this campaign is hitting the campaign trail to listen to, meet with, and learn from people of all backgrounds — not spending time calling donors behind closed doors.
Supporters like you made Beto’s launch an incredible success, and you are going to be supporting this campaign every single step of the way. We could never win this fight for the future of Texas without you on our side.
[But if we’re going to stay on track and fund a campaign that can reach all 254 Texas counties, we need to ask for your support. If you’re able, please make your suggested contribution of $3 today to help elect Beto as the next Governor of Texas.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50257?refcode=ema20211126-164269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=164269%2E444211%2EnzvF5P)
Thank you for your support,
Cynthia Cano
Beto for Texas

name: Matt Brown and Cynthia Mendes
subject: We need leaders who understand how hard this season can be on Rhode Island families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
It’s been almost 300 days of Governor McKee sitting on $1.1 billion in
emergency COVID relief funding — and he still hasn’t spent a dime of it to
help Rhode Islanders in need.

Every day of inaction on this issue is a policy failure by Governor McKee,
Lt. Governor Sabina Matos, and the entire corrupt establishment. Today is
Black Friday, and for many Rhode Island families who are struggling, the
costs of the holiday season and winter weather are setting in.

We desperately need our elected leaders in office to understand the level
of urgency that Rhode Islanders feel after enduring almost two years of a
pandemic, and it’s almost shocking how little has been done to help. Rhode
Island is the only Democratic-led state that hasn’t spent any emergency
relief funds designated to them from the American Rescue Plan.

We’ve been waiting for them to provide relief for MONTHS, and we need them
to step up and take action NOW.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/arpa-petition-20211104/?t=1010&akid=266%2E43343%2EQEy7nA ]Sign our petition calling on Governor McKee to spend all $1.1 billion
in emergency relief funds, so that we can help our communities recover and
survive this crisis.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/signup/arpa-petition-20211104/?t=1011&akid=266%2E43343%2EQEy7nA ]ADD YOUR NAME

Thank you for taking a stand with us.

Matt and Cynthia

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

name: James Tarantin
subject: Never Changing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c64145b1282434e850d61f5e6be40a9&_e=UoBbtT0-Y1OEKfgoDYm404z2DgG4Swr9AM5rBQobvkBJ5rC1mser6zF4L-VMKVfLE4oWOMzeneWiOeVrSNq5_B95mlX8pKtKpU-BGDAw8v0gdByH2LAfkxkSQ9KBBkNNRxmGLEbaDSFFjOnbArzDMA3gETtdJrxwBZjgQJVBDjhBXAADvvkw0J2vsA3-pPtW42B9I4d7bca7euXgwjvM9t--H0B7-iTGnzr16ayTo_bFsterIaKohAaKChuYDTEVmEdDd4rDNXkexM3CppWiDPEz4SBLH749ErelHmaNLsvL8h5DqC1qcgAD3r2O28yttprvuAapymif6TUWdpzeEZ3I1MjUz0SVfZbuTmhWLc1hWZi6D-W_9eu4hADxozTw0F6viAqkRrOjnUJcXJDpe9SdPqW-0eKhSs1Y5RXksDU9dX6RbC09l1wlmqogH7ZEmZq_QbaJtMXiqxEWq2Dk8LmryVCw45Tml7YP6S1h8Kk%3D)

Hey Fellow American,

I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world.

**Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision.**

I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. **_END OF STORY._**

[** DO YOU AGREE WITH THE DECISION OF OUR 45TH PRESIDENT? **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c64145b1282434e850d61f5e6be40a9&_e=UoBbtT0-Y1OEKfgoDYm404z2DgG4Swr9AM5rBQobvkBJ5rC1mser6zF4L-VMKVfLE4oWOMzeneWiOeVrSNq5_B95mlX8pKtKpU-BGDAw8v0gdByH2LAfkxkSQ9KBBkNNRxmGLEbaDSFFjOnbArzDMA3gETtdJrxwBZjgQJVBDjhBXAADvvkw0J2vsA3-pPtW42B9I4d7bca7euXgwjvM9t--H0B7-iTGnzr16ayTo_bFsterIaKohAaKChuYDTEVmEdDd4rDNXkexM3CppWiDLH-fF6HUYztz2L5GupUCdNSbDE_QlIqvWd_3Q3JvSMqDKf2OUYMB2CAc4w-lk9zBvgqLFRcKX1hosgfPYZYqsreJABWOAHr-iiW4zN9aI-cd5FoAyYeodOeU8abkCxYahBAE3dl2jlXIn_w80NykJxqRJbnPjYqhNcVy_6m33plgNYX1eksa6VEd-tHlhUB8SgNACqGowjMm35oV2fOk5I%3D)
The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel.

Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. [**Don’t you agree Fellow American?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c64145b1282434e850d61f5e6be40a9&_e=UoBbtT0-Y1OEKfgoDYm404z2DgG4Swr9AM5rBQobvkBJ5rC1mser6zF4L-VMKVfLE4oWOMzeneWiOeVrSNq5_B95mlX8pKtKpU-BGDAw8v0gdByH2LAfkxkSQ9KBBkNNRxmGLEbaDSFFjOnbArzDMA3gETtdJrxwBZjgQJVBDjhBXAADvvkw0J2vsA3-pPtW42B9I4d7bca7euXgwjvM9t--H0B7-iTGnzr16ayTo_bFsterIaKohAaKChuYDTEVmEdDd4rDNXkexM3CppWiDAGsDhAEdy_APbKAvCj0-dXLrVSlhjwHtdkURk5NKp4I_K50v1InseWpPk4P2jk9zSOL_UkQVDbaUNEebnSKlYAuwIF7RhcxuAQfopTxRGkArT8a1EOVyCTxHDep6sgOV_saZ84Juh_Pl8Lo9R8fYfOPov78rkE8ijSo8nuK0SclRzo94epnvPp55u9cPz5NeIfpJYIexNG87mS8pH5_GpQ%3D)

**I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

clean_body: Our 45th President moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem for a reason. Let’s keep it that way. | Hey Fellow American, I was born in Israel, and I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate. I mention this because the day our 45th President declared Jerusalem as the new home of the U.S. embassy in Israel, was a day I’ll never forget, and the same can be said for millions more around the world. Regardless of how you feel about our 45th President, he moved the U.S. Embassy from Tel Aviv to Jerusalem, and the majority of Americans agree with that decision. I don’t care what radical liberals or political correctness says, Jerusalem is the Capital of Israel, and the only country in the Middle East that is willing to protect Judeo-Christian holy sites is Israel. END OF STORY. The radical liberals have been against this from the beginning. Anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and the Squad continue to quietly push anti-Israel policies. Even Joe Biden is trying to undermine this move by cozying up to the Palestinian Authorities who openly shelter terrorists that attack innocent women and children in Israel. Even if you don’t agree with him on any other issue, our 45th President made the right decision in recognizing Jerusalem as the Capital of Israel. I am Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and I know full well that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values. We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate. Thank you, James Tarantin for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: V. Demings
subject: This is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39039767/318131973/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1759-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDFlNzZhNy0xNTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwwVdTJL81kCUsglqWbnMrDW1dOr-mJOGInN8-dNRnk=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39039768/318131974/-144803992?refcode=jtk1759-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDFlNzZhNy0xNTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwwVdTJL81kCUsglqWbnMrDW1dOr-mJOGInN8-dNRnk=&emci=033bf418-794d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=b41e76a7-154f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/033bf418-794d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/b41e76a7-154f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDFlNzZhNy0xNTRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwwVdTJL81kCUsglqWbnMrDW1dOr-mJOGInN8-dNRnk=&id=123159867). name: gillian
subject: I just left the hospital and I wanted to send you my thoughts:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Gillian Battino for U
body:
hey there
Hey there — it’s Dr. Gillian. I just left the hospital and I wanted to send you my thoughts:
After every shift, I have another story to tell about a Wisconsin family being hurt by our broken health care system. Sometimes, it’s a single mom that cannot afford her child's inhaler. Other times, it’s a senior who came in under weight because they chose to fill their prescription instead of buying groceries for the past few weeks.
We are the wealthiest country on earth. These people don’t have to be enduring this — it’s a policy decision that Republicans like Ron Johnson are making when they fail to get behind legislation to expand Medicare and lower prescription drug costs.
I’m running for Senate because the status quo is killing us. We can’t let Republicans in the pockets of Big Pharma keep making decisions about our health care. As a doctor, I will fight to expand health care to every American under Medicare for All. Despite what Republicans want you to think, I know it’s possible.
If you’re with me on this, then we sincerely need your support before our November deadline on the 30th. Here is a secure, personal link to chip in. I hope to see your name come in tonight, it would mean the world to me: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/GBWI-ALL-Email-Nov2021-FR-November](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39039840/318136485/600862964?refcode=E12665-20211126-LiteNew-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTYzOWVlMS0xNzRmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lvnw7wjt1FkmLrpnFyybIEvAYweRuxhjL5vUaw18-yE=)**
Thanks for reading,
-Dr. Gillian Battino

Paid for by Dr. Gillian Battino for U.S. Senate. name: Tim Ryan
subject: I need to be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1533%2E3611125%2Eci0ZDp ][IMG]

Folks, I need to be honest.

November is the most difficult month of the year for fundraising. Right
now, we’re on track to fall $94,826.75 short of our monthly goal. I’m not
exaggerating, that’s our real deficit.

Meanwhile, my Republican opponents keep raking in huge checks from shady
mega-donors. Peter Thiel even dumped $10 million into a super PAC
supporting J.D. Vance. The GOP is doing everything they can to build a
dark money war chest ready to attack our campaign.

We can’t risk losing this seat because we didn’t have the resources to
fight back against their attacks. With our deadline only five days away, I
need you now more than ever.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6094?t=1007&akid=1533%2E3611125%2Eci0ZDp ]Make a contribution of $25 or more to help us win this Senate seat in
Ohio. We can’t do it without you:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6095?t=1009&akid=1533%2E3611125%2Eci0ZDp ]Donate $50

Thanks. I appreciate it.

-- Tim
