Team, When I first began serving Colorado, I was called the “accidental senator.” But after putting my head down, doing the work, and securing wins for the people of Colorado, winning re-election was no accident. Because grassroots supporters like you helped Democrats win back the Senate last year, we scored major wins for the American people. We passed the bipartisan _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ , so we can update our roads, bridges, high-speed internet, public transportation, and water infrastructure, and are on track to create good-paying jobs all across Colorado to complete these projects. Just last week, the House passed the _Build Back Better Act_ — a piece of legislation that will, among other things, lower the cost of child care, expand access to affordable health care, fight climate change, cap drug costs, and make the wealthy and big corporations pay their fair share. It’s how we start to build an economy that works for everyone and includes my provision to extend the monthly Child Tax Credit payments for another year. These achievements are only possible because of you. This team pitched in to build the campaign infrastructure required to win. You might be surprised to hear this, but a large portion of our budget comes from grassroots contributions to emails just like this one. **And, I’m the only Democratic Senator running for re-election that’s refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money because I believe fighting money in politics means leading by example.** From day one, this team has been fueled by hard-working folks chipping in what they could for a movement we all believe in. There will never be a question of who I work for — that answer will always be you. But to win this race and keep Colorado blue, our campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell, dark money groups, and extreme opponents here in Colorado. It’s expensive work with the National GOP raking in millions and a wealthy self-funded opponent launching attack ads against me, we can’t rest for a moment. **So will you pitch in just $10 now before Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline? From day one, this team has been fueled by hard-working folks chipping in what they could for a movement we all believe in. There will never be a question of who I work for — that answer will always be you. But to win this race and keep Colorado blue, our campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell, dark money groups, and extreme opponents here in Colorado. It’s expensive work with the National GOP raking in millions and a wealthy self-funded opponent launching attack ads against me, we can’t rest for a moment. So will you pitch in just $10 now before Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline? Any amount will make a difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks to the hard work of this team, we’re on track to cut child poverty nearly in half and have secured critical investment for Colorado’s infrastructure. I look forward to building on this progress but can only do that if we work together to fend off Republican attacks and win re-election next year. Thanks for all your help. — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
| | | **__BLACK FRIDAY TRIPLE MATCH: ****UNLOCKED
__** | [TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT TO DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
ID: #5907903
TRIPLE MATCH DONATION: ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFAvz30h~)[PENDING

](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFAvz30h~) | [CONFIRM YOUR TRIPLE-MATCHED DONATION >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We're over the moon!!

**To celebrate Black Friday, all-star Democrats have agreed to TRIPLE MATCH every gift to defend our House Majority --_but ONLY for the next NINE hours._**
[**
This is an INCREDIBLE opportunity to TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT in the fight to defend our House Democrats -- so we 're calling on EVERY grassroots supporter to take advantage of it before time runs out at midnight. Can we count on you to rush in $3, $10, or even $25 straight away?**](https://links.e.dccc.)

We get it: Your favorite stores might be offering some incredible deals of their own today.

But here's the thing: There's just too much at stake for a grassroots supporter like you to let this Triple Match opportunity pass you by.

**The American Rescue Plan. Infrastructure investment. The Build Back Better agenda.** They were all delivered by our House Majority.

**Voting rights. Reproductive rights. A sustainable future.** They could all be on the line if we lose it.

****[So make no mistake: At this pivotal moment, your TRIPLE-MATCHED gift before midnight tonight could be the difference between defending our hold on the House and watching it collapse at the hands of Trump's Republicans.](https://links.e.dccc.)****

Please, can we count on you to take advantage of this INCREDIBLE Black Friday opportunity and rush in $3 before midnight to support House Democrats?

**TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVATED: 9-HOUR MIDNIGHT DEADLINE**

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46008595&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMzAzODI2MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $26. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46008595&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMzAzODI2MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). subject: There is little time left!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I need your help! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8068158c72&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the America-First, Trump endorsed, candidate running for Secretary of State in Arizona.

**[And I am writing you today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9454383cde&e=44b8c466b0) because we are about to be in December, the last month of the quarter. Then, it will be 2022 – and we know that the Democrats will up the ante on their all out assault on my campaign and election integrity.**

_[For us to be on target for our end of quarter goal, we desperately need to raise and additional $25,000 by the end of the month. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fb67647870&e=44b8c466b0) Otherwise, our campaign will be vulnerable to attack._

_But here’s the thing, we need to strike first. We need to stay on the offensive! [Can you donate $25, $50, or $100 tonight to strike an offensive blow for election integrity?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=23cb72ee2f&e=44b8c466b0)_

Right now, the media is silencing us and attacking us, refusing to give us a voice. Why? Because they know we know the truth.

**They know the election was stolen because they were part of the plan! They are complicit. Of course they want to silence truth-tellers.**

_And the fact of the matter is this. Spreading the word of election integrity, pushing for a nationwide audit, and protecting 2022 from the steal is an expensive task. [And it requires money.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1576c822ce&e=44b8c466b0)_

[_And this is why I am writing you today. We need to hit our fundraising goal of $25,000 THIS WEEK! There is no time left. Can you chip in with a generous contribution today?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f14a4e4553&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bda8fc1948&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| President Trump is behind us, and Main Stream Media hates us for it.

_State Rep. Mark Finchem, R-Oro Valley, and a Trump-backed candidate for secretary of state, recently has raised again claims that Pima County inserted extra votes in its totals. It is a claim raised last year at a Nov. 30 meeting in Phoenix featuring Trump's lawyer Rudy Giuliani and has been offered without evidence._

Well, Ronald Hansen – I have the evidence! And we need to find more. The President isn’t backing us on a hunch.

**_It’s cold, hard facts. Those tens of thousands of inserted votes?_**

**_We believe we found them. But it takes money to push forward and to fight back against liars like AZ Central and the Main Stream Media who puts forth this orchestrated propaganda._**

[_Please help with a generous donation today. Election integrity depends on you!_
_Help us reach our end of month $25,000 goal!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2eabe76955&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4eea732430&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5a4362a7c9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a5f4f4d9a4&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: Aunt Sharon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, As I gather with my family for the holidays, I got to thinking about my Aunt Sharon and I want to share our story with you. When my mom was pregnant with me, my dad was murdered. So my aunts and my mom were my support system. I was particularly close to my Aunt, Sharon Carver. I was in math class. We had a substitute teacher who turned on the TV. What she was watching was airplanes crashing into the World Trade Center and the Pentagon. I went home and I’ll never forget my Mom was in the living room watching the news. I looked at the TV and said “Isn’t that where Aunt Sharon works?” It was September 11, 2001. I never saw Aunt Sharon again. I was young. I didn’t know how to process the grief I felt. I began to run away from home, to skip school. What I _needed_ was someone to talk to. What I _received_ was being shackled and taken away to a juvenile detention facility. This whole campaign has this at its core. It’s so much bigger than the people that get in trouble. It’s the system that catches them when they get in trouble. We get forgotten, left out, punished. Politicians don’t knock on our doors, don’t speak to our issues. **[_I’m determined to do things differently. I’m going to fight for the left out and left behind. That’s why I’m running. I hope you’re with me and will consider making a donation today to our campaign >>_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2LnmSqyusjyY9Hh7Wgjr5RmewhW0VXs8OLbT-zy5K_2x2uoXgWNPxuwjk5dLtWspbd0udug1JND05jsYfAIBP0XD4KOPKDxHQk8buNJLR7tuynKyDJ9YXgkjm8l6rxZQwCdHkLVgZUG1kt0hW9a-bbWQto_29XowVJPkZitieLSEgx76n8TfLwYFQCAmPI-PT1rzj0i6wk-eMPrq58LP0f3Lldsnkp8UXNQX0GYDnZPXWryjFOtOlsh9kd9ugK6Tm/3hc/E5fRQEKtQQaos3X0aHZ2qg/h0/cwN2LgrAiuJ4UvaF91G_7wPIVSnd_AwmXobF773evvU)** I miss my Aunt Sharon every single day. But her spirit and her guidance stays with me and helped shape the person I am today. I refuse to let her down. I'm so grateful for all your support so far, Mckayla
---

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Abbott’s head start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Winning in Texas will be no easy feat.
#
Winning in Texas will be no easy feat.
Our opponent will have corporate PACs funneling in millions of dollars to attack us, plus the support of ultra-wealthy Washington Republicans. On top of all that, he’s had a big head start — _he even ran an ad attacking Beto before Beto jumped into this race._
We’re counting on grassroots donors like you to even the playing field. Folks like you chipping in $5 or $20 at a time are going to determine whether we can reach voters in all 254 Texas counties and earn their support.
[Help Beto build a winning campaign and go up against massive GOP spending in Texas by chipping in just $3 or more today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50257?refcode=ema20211126-164010&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=164010%2E444211%2EAdcWLs)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50257?refcode=ema20211126-164010&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=164010%2E444211%2EAdcWLs)**
Together, we can put an end to the fringe policies and incompetence that we’re seeing in Texas today. But victory will require a historic number of people coming together to fund this campaign, and we need as many as possible pitching in.
Whether we can pull together the kind of grassroots fundraising operation powerful enough to beat a Republican incumbent and the special interests backing his campaign is entirely up to us.
[Let’s show them what we’re made of. Pitch in just $3 or more to help power our campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50257?refcode=ema20211126-164010&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=164010%2E444211%2EAdcWLs)
—Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211126-164010-footer&t=22&refcode2=164010_444211_AdcWLs&akid=164010%2E444211%2EAdcWLs)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

body:
Is everything ok?

Chairman Scott asked me to personally reach out to you because we haven't heard back from you...

We need 10,000 more votes if we're to hold Biden accountable for putting the Chinese ahead of Americans.

Thank you for your help,

Daria
NRSC Digital Director

**Let’s look at the facts:**

Xi forced Biden to meet for a virtual summit in the middle of the night that only benefitted the Chinese.

After Biden claimed that things were ‘strictly business’ between them and that they were not ‘old friends’, Xi opened the summit by greeting Biden as an “old friend.”

The summit was completely pro-China and Biden didn’t get his way on even one agenda item.

Biden failed to hold China accountable for genocide, the Hong Kong abomination, purposefully intimidating Taiwan, and global predatory economic activities hurting American families.

Thank you for your help, Daria NRSC Digital Director On Monday November 22nd, the NRSC wrote: | Fellow American - Chinese President Xi once again showed the world that President Biden bows to him and not the other way around. | Is President Biden putting America First or Last? | UNIQUE ID: #188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb OPINION STATUS: Let’s look at the facts: Xi forced Biden to meet for a virtual summit in the middle of the night that only benefitted the Chinese. After Biden claimed that things were ‘strictly business’ between them and that they were not ‘old friends’, Xi opened the summit by greeting Biden as an “old friend.” The summit was completely pro-China and Biden didn’t get his way on even one agenda item. Biden failed to hold China accountable for genocide, the Hong Kong abomination, purposefully intimidating Taiwan, and global predatory economic activities hurting American families. If you miss President Trump’s take-no-prisoners strategy with China, then we need to hear from you!
